slides.english: Open the Holy Qur'an and hold it in front of your face. Then recite

slides.arabic:
بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِكِتَابِكَ الْمُنْزَلِ وَ مَا فِيهِ
Alaahumma inni asaloka be kitaabekal munzale Wa maa feeh,
O Allah I beseech Thee in the name of Thy revealed Book and that which is in it,
وَ فِيهِ اسْمُكَ الْأَكْبَرُ وَ أَسْمَاؤُكَ الْحُسْنَى وَ مَا يُخَافُ وَ يُرْجَى أَنْ تَجْعَلَنِي مِنْ عُتَقَائِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
wa feehismokal akbaro wa asmaakal husnaa, wa maa yokhaafo Wa yurjaa an taj-alani min otaqaaeka minan-Naar
and Thy Great Name and Thy (Other) beautiful names are in it, and in it there is that which warns and gives hope to include me among those who have been set free from the Hellfire.
slides.english: Hajaat / pray for your needs.
Take the Holy Qur'an and hold it on your head and recite

slides.arabic:
اللّهُمّ بِحَقّ هذَا القُرْآنِ
Allaahumma be haqqe haazal Qur'an
O Allah: for the sake of this (Holy) Qur'an,
وَبِحَقّ مَنْ أَرْسَلْتَهُ بِهِ
we be haqqe man arsaltahoo beh
and for the sake of that person through whom You sent it,
وَبِحَقّ كُلّ مُؤْمِنٍ مَدَحْتَهُ فِيهِ
Wa be haqqe kulle momenin madahtahoo feeh
and for the sake of those believers who have been praised therein,
وَبِحَقّكَ عَلَيْهِمْ
we be haqqeka alaihim
and in the name of Your obligation to them,
فَال أَحَدَ أَعْرَفُ بِحَقّكَ مِنْكَ.
fa-laa ahada a'arafo be haqqeka mink
no one is aware of Your obligation more than You
slides.english: Keep the Qur'an on your head and recite each of the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times

slides.arabic:
بِكَ يَا اللّهُ،
bika yaallahu
For Your sake, O Allah,
slides.english: Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times
Recite the following 10 times

slides.arabic:
بِالحُجّةِ،
bilhujjati
for the sake of al-Hujjah.
slides.english: In the end, pray to Almighty Allah to fulfil your needs.
Sajdah Shukr / Thankfulness (long prostration is recommended)

slides.arabic:
أَظْلَمَ الذَّنْبُ مِنْ عَبْدِكَ، فَلْيُحْسِنِ العَفْوُ مِنْ عِندِكَ.
Azomad dhambo min abdika, fal yohsanal afwu min indika
The sin has become greater from Your servant, so let forgiveness from You be perfected.
slides.english: Ask for Health and Well-being (Aafiyat)

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ العَفْوَ وَالعَافِيَةَ، المُعَافَاةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
Allhumma Inni Asaloka Al Afwa wal Afiyata, walmuafata fid-dunya wal akhira
O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being, and complete protection in this world and the Hereafter.
السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yabna rasuli allahi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yabna khatami alnnabiyyina
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O son of the seal of the Prophets.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yabna sayyidi almursalina
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Messengers.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yabna sayyidi alwasiyyina
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya aba `abdillahi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُسَيْنُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya husaynu ibna `aliyyin
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O al-Husayn the son of `Ali.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yabna fatimata sayyidati nisa'i al`alamina
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the Doyenne of the women of the world.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ وَلِيِّهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waliyya allahi wabna waliyyihi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O saint of Allah and son of His saint.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَفِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ صَفِيِّهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya safiyya allahi wabna safiyyihi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O select of Allah and son of His select.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ حُجَّتِهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya hujjata allahi wabna hujjatihi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah and son of His argument.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حَبِيبَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ حَبِيبِهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya habiba allahi wabna habibihi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O beloved by Allah and son of the beloved by Him.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا سَفِيرَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ سَفِيرِهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya safira allahi wabna safirihi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O representative of Allah and son of His representative.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَازِنَ ٱلكِتَابِ ٱلْمَسْطُورِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya khazina alkitabi almasturi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O keeper of the inscribed Scripture.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ ٱلتَّوْرَاةِ وَٱلإِنْجِيلِ وَٱلزَّبُورِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha alttawrati wal-injili walzzaburi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Torah, the Gospel, and the Psalms.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَمِينَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya amina alrrahmani
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O trustee of the All-beneficent God.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا شَرِيكَ ٱلقُرْآنِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya sharika alqur'ani
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O partner of the Qur'an.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَمُودَ ٱلدِّينِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya `amuda alddini
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O support of the religion.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَابَ حِكْمَةِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya baba hikmati rabbi al`alamina
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O door to the wisdom of the Lord of the worlds.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَابَ حِطَّةٍ ٱلَّذِي مَنْ دَخَلَهُ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلآمِنِينَ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya baba hittatin alladhi man dakhalahu kana min al-aminina
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O door of Forgiveness; he who enters from this door will be of the secured ones.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْبَةَ عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya `aybata `ilmi allahi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O case of Allah’s knowledge.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْضِعَ سِرِّ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya mawdi`a sirri allahi
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O place of Allah’s secret.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi walwitra almawtura
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O (the object of) Allah’s vengeance and the violated sanctity.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلأَرْوَاحِ ٱلَّتِي حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ وَأَنَاخَتْ بِرَحْلِكَ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka wa `ala al-arwahi allati hallat bifina'ika wa anakhat birahlika
slides.english: Peace be upon you and upon the souls that resided in your yard and settled down near your caravan.

slides.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي وَنَفْسِي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi wa nafsi ya aba `abdillahi
slides.english: May Allah accept my father, my mother, and myself as ransoms for you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

slides.arabic: لَقَدْ عَظُمَتِ ٱلْمُصِيبَةُ وَجَلَّتِ ٱلرَّزِيَّةُ بِكَ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَهْلِ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ
slides.transliteration: laqad `azumat almusibatu wa jallat alrraziyyatu bika `alayna wa `ala jami`i ahli al-islami
slides.english: O Abu-`Abdullah, unbearable is the sorrow and never-racking is the agony you put up with, for us and for all (true) Muslims.

slides.arabic: فَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أَسَّسَتْ أَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ البَيْتِ
slides.transliteration: fala`ana allahu ummatan assasat asasa alzzulmi waljawri `alaykum ahla albayti
slides.english: Curse of Allah be on the people who laid the basis of wronging and injustice against you the Household of the Prophet.

slides.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً دَفَعَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَقَامِكُمْ
slides.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan dafa`atkum `an maqamikum
slides.english: Curse of Allah be upon the people who removed you from your position

slides.arabic: وَأَزَالَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَرَاتِبِكُمُ ٱلَّتِي رَتَّبَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فِيهَا
slides.transliteration: wa azalatkum `an maratibikum allati rattabakum allahu fiha
slides.english: and took you away from your actual ranks that Allah has chosen for you.

slides.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي وَنَفْسِي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi wa nafsi ya aba `abdillahi
slides.english: May Allah accept my father, my mother, and me as ransoms for you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

slides.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدِ ٱقْشَعَرَّتْ لِدِمَائِكُمْ أَظِلَّةُ ٱلعَرْشِ مَعَ أَظِلَّةِ ٱلْخَلائِقِ
slides.transliteration: ashhadu laqad iqsha`arrat lidima'ikum azillatu al`arshi ma`a azillati alkhala'iqi
slides.english: I bear witness that the shades of the Divine Throne shared the shades of the creatures in shuddering for the shedding of your blood.

slides.arabic: وَبَكَتْكُمُ ٱلسَّمَاءُ وَٱلأَرْضُ وَسُكَّانُ ٱلْجِنَانِ وَٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ
slides.transliteration: wa bakatkum alssama'u wal-ardu wa sukkanu aljinani walbarri walbahri
slides.english: The heavens, the earth, and the inhabitants of the gardens of Paradise, the lands, and the oceans—all those wept for you.

slides.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ عَدَدَ مَا فِي عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: salla allahu `alayka `adada ma fi `ilmi allahi
slides.english: May Allah shower upon you blessings as many as the number of what is there in the knowledge of Allah.

slides.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ دَاعِيَ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: labbayka da`iya allahi
slides.english: Here I am at your service, O caller to Allah.

slides.arabic: إِنْ كَانَ لَمْ يُجِبْكَ بَدَنِي عِنْدَ ٱسْتِغَاثَتِكَ وَلِسَانِي عِنْدَ ٱسْتِنْصَارِكَ
slides.transliteration: in kana lam yujibka badani `inda istighathatika wa lisani `inda istinsarika
slides.english: If my body could not respond to your call when you called for aid and my tongue could not respond to your call for help,

slides.arabic: فَقَدْ أَجَابَكَ قَلْبِي وَسَمْعِي وَبَصَرِي
slides.transliteration: faqad ajabaka qalbi wa sam`i wa basari
slides.english: then my heart, my hearing, and my sight have verily responded to you.

slides.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّنَا إِنْ كَانَ وَعْدُ رَبِّنَا لَمَفْعُولاً
slides.transliteration: subhana rabbina in kana wa`du rabbina lamaf`ulan
slides.english: Glory be to our Lord! Most surely, the promise of our Lord was to be fulfilled.

slides.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ طُهْرٌ طَاهِرٌ مُطَهَّرٌ مِنْ طُهْرٍ طَاهِرٍ مُطَهَّرٍ
slides.transliteration: ashhadu annaka tuhrun tahirun mutahharun min tuhrin tahirin mutahharin
slides.english: I bear witness that you are pure, immaculate, and purified and you are the offspring of the pure, immaculate, and purified ones.

slides.arabic: طَهُرْتَ وَطَهُرَتْ بِكَ ٱلْبِلاَدُ
slides.transliteration: tahurta wa tahurat bika albiladu
slides.english: You are indeed pure and you are the reason for the purity of the lands.

slides.arabic: وَطَهُرَتْ أَرْضٌ أَنْتَ بِهَا وَطَهُرَ حَرَمُكَ
slides.transliteration: wa tahurat ardun anta biha wa tahura haramuka
slides.english: Pure is the land where you are and pure is your holy shrine.

slides.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ أَمَرْتَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَٱلْعَدْلِ وَدَعَوْتَ إِلَيْهِمَا
slides.transliteration: ashhadu annaka qad amarta bilqisti wal`adli wa da`awta ilayhima
slides.english: I bear witness that you enjoined justice and fairness and you called to them.

slides.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ صَادِقٌ صِدِّيقٌ صَدَقْتَ فِيمَا دَعَوْتَ إِلَيْهِ
slides.transliteration: wa annaka sadiqun siddiqun sadaqta fima da`awta ilayhi
slides.english: And you are verily honest and veracious, and you were truthful in that for which you called.

slides.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ ثَارُ ٱللَّهِ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ
slides.transliteration: wa annaka tharu allahi fi al-ardi
slides.english: And you are verily (the object of) Allah’s vengeance on the earth.

slides.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ بَلَّغْتَ عَنِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka qad ballaghta `an allahi
slides.english: And I bear witness that you did convey on behalf of Allah,

slides.arabic: وَعَنْ جَدِّكَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: wa `an jaddika rasuli allahi
slides.english: on behalf of your grandfather the Messenger of Allah,

slides.arabic: وَعَنْ أَبِيكَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
slides.transliteration: wa `an abika amiri almu'minina
slides.english: on behalf of your father the Commander of the Faithful,

slides.arabic: وَعَنْ أَخِيكَ ٱلْحَسَنِ
slides.transliteration: wa `an akhika alhasani
slides.english: and on behalf of your brother al-Hasan.

slides.arabic: وَنَصَحْتَ وَجَاهَدْتَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: wa nasahta wa jahadta fi sabili allahi
slides.english: And you advised and strove in the way of Allah

slides.arabic: وَعَبَدْتَهُ مُخْلِصاً حَتَّىٰ أَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
slides.transliteration: wa `abadtahu mukhlisan hatta ataka alyaqinu
slides.english: and you served Him sincerely until death came upon you.

slides.arabic: فَجَزَاكَ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرَ جَزَاءِ ٱلسَّابِقِينَ
slides.transliteration: fajazaka allahu khayra jaza'i alssabiqina
slides.english: So, may Allah award you with the best of the rewarding of the foremost (to deeds of goodness).

slides.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً
slides.transliteration: wa salla allahu `alayka wa sallama tasliman
slides.english: And may Allah bless and exalt you thoroughly.

slides.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلْمَظْلُومِ
slides.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa salli `ala alhusayni almazlumi
slides.english: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, and send blessings upon al-Husayn the wronged,

slides.arabic: ٱلشَّهِيدِ ٱلرَّشِيدِ
slides.transliteration: alshshahidi alrrashidi
slides.english: the martyr, the orthodox,

slides.arabic: قَتِيلِ ٱلْعَبَرَاتِ
slides.transliteration: qatili al`abarati
slides.english: the slain one whom is wept heavily,

slides.arabic: وَأَسِيرِ ٱلْكُرُبَاتِ
slides.transliteration: wa asiri alkurubati
slides.english: and the object of agonies

slides.arabic: صَلاةً نَامِيَةً زَاكِيَةً مُبَارَكَةً
slides.transliteration: salatan namiyatan zakiyatan mubarakatan
slides.english: with such blessings that are increasing, growing, and sacred;

slides.arabic: يَصْعَدُ أَوَّلُهَا وَلاَ يَنْفَدُ آخِرُهَا
slides.transliteration: yas`adu awwaluha wa la yanfadu akhiruha
slides.english: the first of which ascends and the last of which is infinite,

slides.arabic: أَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلادِ أَنْبِيَائِكَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
slides.transliteration: afdala ma sallayta `ala ahadin min awladi anbiya'ika almursalina
slides.english: and with the best blessings that You ever sent on any of Your missioned Prophets’ sons.

slides.arabic: يَا إِلٰهَ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
slides.transliteration: ya ilaha al`alamina
slides.english: O God of the worlds!

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلصِّدِّيقُ ٱلطَّيِّبُ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ayyuha alssiddiqu alttayyibu
slides.english: Peace be upon you, O veracious, pure,

slides.arabic: ٱلزَّكِيُّ ٱلْحَبِيبُ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُ
slides.transliteration: alzzakiyyu alhabibu almuqarrabu
slides.english: immaculate, dear, favorite,

slides.arabic: وَٱبْنَ رَيْحَانَةِ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: wabna rayhanati rasuli allahi
slides.english: and son of the basil of Allah’s Messenger.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهِيدٍ مُحْتَسِبٍ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka min shahidin muhtasibin
slides.english: Peace be upon you as you are steadfast martyr.

slides.arabic: وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
slides.transliteration: wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
slides.english: Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

slides.arabic: مَا أَكْرَمَ مَقَامَكَ وَأَشْرَفَ مُنْقَلَبَكَ
slides.transliteration: ma akrama maqamaka wa ashrafa munqalabaka
slides.english: How noble your position is and how honorable your seat is.

slides.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدْ شَكَرَ ٱللَّهُ سَعْيَكَ
slides.transliteration: ashhadu laqad shakara allahu sa`yaka
slides.english: I bear witness that Allah thanked you for your efforts,

slides.arabic: وَأَجْزَلَ ثَوَابَكَ
slides.transliteration: wa ajzala thawabaka
slides.english: magnified your rewards,

slides.arabic: وَأَلْحَقَكَ بِٱلذَّرْوَةِ ٱلْعَالِيَةِ
slides.transliteration: wa alhaqaka bildhdharwati al`aliyati
slides.english: and joined you to the exalted summit

slides.arabic: حَيْثُ ٱلشَّرَفُ كُلُّ ٱلشَّرَفِ
slides.transliteration: haythu alshsharafu kullu alshsharafi
slides.english: where there is the entire honor

slides.arabic: وَفِي ٱلْغُرَفِ ٱلسَّامِيَةِ
slides.transliteration: wa fi alghurafi alssamiyati
slides.english: in the elevated chambers.

slides.arabic: كَمَا مَنَّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ قَبْلُ وَجَعَلَكَ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلبَيْتِ
slides.transliteration: kama manna `alayka min qablu wa ja`alaka min ahli albayti
slides.english: Similarly, He had bestowed upon you and made you one of the members of the Household of the Prophet

slides.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ أَذْهَبَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمُ ٱلرِّجْسَ وَطَهَّرَهُمْ تَطْهِيراً
slides.transliteration: alladhina adhhaba allahu `anhum alrrijsa wa tahharahum tathiran
slides.english: from whom Allah removed filth and whom He purified with thorough purification.

slides.arabic: صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكَ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ وَرِضْوَانُهُ
slides.transliteration: salawatu allahi `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu wa ridwanuhu
slides.english: Allah’s blessings, mercy, benedictions, and pleasure be upon you.

slides.arabic: فَٱشْفَعْ أَيُّهَا ٱلسَّيِّدُ ٱلطَّاهِرُ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ
slides.transliteration: fashfa` ayyuha alssayyidu alttahiru ila rabbika
slides.english: So, O pure master, (please) intercede for me with your Lord

slides.arabic: فِي حَطِّ ٱلأَثْقَالِ عَنْ ظَهْرِي وَتَخْفِيفِهَا عَنِّي
slides.transliteration: fi hatti al-athqali `an zahri wa takhfifiha `anni
slides.english: so that He may unburden and relieve me from the loads (of sins) that I carry on my back.

slides.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْ ذُلِّي وَخُضُوعِي لَكَ وَلِلسَّيِّدِ أَبِيكَ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمَا
slides.transliteration: warham dhulli wa khudu`i laka wa lilssayyidi abika salla allahu `alaykuma
slides.english: And (please) have mercy upon my humbleness and submission to you and to the master, your father. May Allah bless you both.

slides.arabic: زَادَ ٱللَّهُ فِي شَرَفِكُمْ فِي ٱلآخِرَةِ
slides.transliteration: zada allahu fi sharafikum fi al-akhirati
slides.english: May Allah increase your honor in the Hereafter

slides.arabic: كَمَا شَرَّفَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا
slides.transliteration: kama sharrafakum fi alddunya
slides.english: in the same way as He honored you in this world

slides.arabic: وَأَسْعَدَكُمْ كَمَا أَسْعَدَ بِكُمْ
slides.transliteration: wa as`adakum kama as`ada bikum
slides.english: and may He bless you in the same way as He blessed others on account of you.

slides.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّكُمْ أَعْلاَمُ ٱلدِّينِ
slides.transliteration: wa ashhadu annakum a`lamu alddini
slides.english: And I bear witness that you are the signposts of the religion

slides.arabic: وَنُجُومُ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
slides.transliteration: wa nujumu al`alamina
slides.english: and the stars of the worlds.

slides.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
slides.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alaykum wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
slides.english: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

slides.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ ٱللَّهِ
slides.transliteration: alssalamu `alaykum ya ansara allahi
slides.english: Peace be upon you all, O supporters of Allah

slides.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ رَسُولِهِ
slides.transliteration: wa ansara rasulihi
slides.english: supporters of His Messenger,

slides.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ
slides.transliteration: wa ansara `aliyyi ibni abi talibin
slides.english: supporters of `Ali the son of Abu-Talib

slides.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ فَاطِمَةَ
slides.transliteration: wa ansara fatimata
slides.english: supporters of Fatimah,

slides.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ
slides.transliteration: wa ansara alhasani walhusayni
slides.english: supporters of al-Hasan and al-Husayn,

slides.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ
slides.transliteration: wa ansara al-islami
slides.english: and supporters of Islam.

slides.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكُمْ لَقَدْ نَصَحْتُمْ لِلَّهِ
slides.transliteration: ashhadu annakum laqad nasahtum lillahi
slides.english: I bear witness that you indeed did sincerely for the sake of Allah

slides.arabic: وَجَاهَدْتُمْ فِي سَبِيلِهِ
slides.transliteration: wa jahadtum fi sabilihi
slides.english: and strove sincerely in His way.

slides.arabic: فَجَزَاكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ وَأَهْلِهِ أَفْضَلَ ٱلْجَزَاءِ
slides.transliteration: fajazakum allahu `an al-islami wa ahlihi afdala aljaza'i
slides.english: So, may Allah reward you on behalf of Islam and its people with the best of rewarding.

slides.arabic: فُزْتُمْ وَٱللَّهِ فَوْزاً عَظِيماً
slides.transliteration: fuztum wallahi fawzan `aziman
slides.english: By Allah I swear, you did win a great success.

slides.arabic: يَا لَيْتَنِي كُنْتُ مَعَكُمْ فَأَفُوزَ فَوْزاً عَظِيماً
slides.transliteration: ya laytani kuntu ma`akum fa'afuza fawzan `aziman
slides.english: I whish I were with you so that I would win a great success.

slides.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكُمْ أَحْيَاءٌ عِنْدَ رَبِّكُمْ تُرْزَقُونَ
slides.transliteration: ashhadu annakum ahya'un `inda rabbikum turzaquna
slides.english: I bear witness that you are alive with your Lord, receiving sustenance.

slides.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكُمُ ٱلشُّهَدَاءُ وَٱلسُّعَدَاءُ
slides.transliteration: ashhadu annakumu alshshuhada'u walssu`ada'u
slides.english: I bear witness that you are the true martyrs and the true happy ones

slides.arabic: وَأَنَّكُمُ ٱلْفَائِزُونَ فِي دَرَجَاتِ ٱلْعُلَىٰ
slides.transliteration: wa annakumu alfa'izuna fi darajati al`ula
slides.english: and you are the winners in the most elevated ranks.

slides.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
slides.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alaykum wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
slides.english: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

slides.arabic:
اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّعَلَىٰمُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O'Allāhsend Your blessings on Muhammad
and the family of Muhammad.

slides.arabic:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِالرَّحْمَٰنِالرَّحِيمِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
bi-smi llahi r-rahmani r-rahimi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
In the Name ofAllāh,
the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا اللَّهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
OAllāh,
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika yal-lah
(1) For Success in Difficult Works

slides.arabic:
يَا رَحْمَنُ يَا رَحِيمُيَا كَرِيمُ يَا مُقِيمُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Most Merciful, O MostCompassionate,
O Most Generous, O Self-Subsisting,
ya rah-mnu ya rahim ya karimu ya muqim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (1) For Success in Difficult Works

slides.arabic:
يَا عَظِيمُ يَا قَدِيمُيَا عَلِيمُ يَا حَلِيمُ يَا حَكِيمُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya `azimu ya qadimya `alimuyahalimuyahakim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Greatest, OEternal, O All-Knowing,
O Forbearing, O Wise.
(1) For Success in Difficult Works

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا سَيِّدَ السَّادَاتِيَا مُجِيبَ الدَّعَوَاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya say-yidas-sadat ya mujibad-da`awat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Master of Masters, O Acceptor of prayers,

slides.arabic:
يَا رَافِعَ الدَّرَجَاتِيَا وَلِيَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rafia'd-darajat ya wali-yal-hasanat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Elevator of rank, O Guardian of good deeds,

slides.arabic:
يَا غَافِرَالْخَطِيئَاتِيَامُعْطِيَالْمَسْأَلاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ghafiral-khati-at ya mua'-ti-yal-mas-alat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Forgiver of evil deeds, O Granter of requests,

slides.arabic:
يَا قَابِلَالتَّوْبَاتِيَا سَامِعَ الأَصْوَاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya qabilat-taw-bat ya samia'l-as-wat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Acceptor of repentance, O Hearer of voices,

slides.arabic:
يَا عَالِمَالْخَفِيَّاتِيَادَافِعَالْبَلِيَّاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya `aalimal-khafi-yat ya dafia'l-bali-yat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Knower of attributes, ORepellerof calamities.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ الْغافِرِينَيَا خَيْرَ الْفَاتِحِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayral-ghafirin ya khayral-fatihin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Best of forgivers, O Best of deciders,

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ النَّاصِرِينَيَا خَيْرَ الْحَاكِمِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayran-nasirin ya khayral-hakimin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Best of helpers, O Best of rulers,

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ الرَّازِقِينَيَا خَيْرَ الْوَارِثِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayrar-raziqin ya khayral-warithin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Best of providers, O Best of inheritors

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ الْحَامِدِينَيَا خَيْرَ الذَّاكِرِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Best ofpraisers, O Best ofrememberers,
ya khayral-hamidin ya khayradh-dhakirin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (3) For Victory & Dignity

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ الْمُنْزِلِينَيَا خَيْرَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayral-munzilin ya khayral-muh-sinin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Best of Dischargers, O Best of benefactors.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ الْعِزَّةُ وَالْجَمَالُيَا مَن لَّهُ الْقُدْرَةُ وَالْكَمَالُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahul-i`iz-zatu wal-jamal ya mal-lahul-qud-ratu wal-kamal
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, to Whom is all glory and virtue,
O He, to Whom is all might and perfection,
(4) For Grandeur in Life and Life Hereafter

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ الْمُلْكُ وَالجَلاَلُيَا مَنْ هُوَ الْكَبِيرُ الْمُتَعَاِل
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahul-mul-ku wal-jalal ya man huwal-kabirul-muta`aal
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, to Whom is all dominion and sublimity, O He, Who is great above all,
(4) For Grandeur in Life and Life Hereafter

slides.arabic:
يَا مُنْشِئَ السَّحَابِ الثِّقَاِليَا مَنْ هُوَ شَدِيدُ الْمِحَاِل
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mun-shias-sahabilth-thiqal ya man huwa shadidul-mihal
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who creates heavy clouds,
O He, Who is the most powerful,
(4) For Grandeur in Life and Life Hereafter

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ هُوَ سَرِيعُ الْحِسَابِيَا مَنْ هُوَ شَدِيدُ الْعِقَابِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa sariu'l-hisab ya man huwa shadidul-i`iqab
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is quick to reckon,
OHe, Who metes out the severest punishment,
(4) For Grandeur in Life and Life Hereafter

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ عِنْدَهُ حُسْنُ الثَّوَابِيَا مَنْ عِنْدَهُ أُمُّ الْكِتَابِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man i`indahu hus-nuth-thawab ya man i`indahu ummul-kitab
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, with Whom is the excellent reward,
O He, with Whom is the Original Book.
(4) For Grandeur in Life and Life Hereafter

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا حَنَّانُ يَا مَنَّانُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Charitable One, O Benefactor,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya han-nanu ya man-nan
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,Verily I beseech You in Your name
(5) For Honour & Exaltation and Expedition of Important Affairs

slides.arabic:
يَا دَيَّانُ يَا بُرْهَانُيَا سُلْطَانُ يَا رِضْوَانُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Judge, O Proof, O Sovereign,
OApprover,
ya day-yanu ya bur-han ya sul-tanu ya rizwan
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (5) For Honour & Exaltation and Expedition of Important Affairs

slides.arabic:
يَا غُفْرَانُ يَا سُبْحَانُ يَا مُسْتَعَانُيَا ذَا الْمَنِّ وَالْبَيَانِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Forgiver, O Elevated One, O Helper,
yaghuf-ranuya subhanuya musta`aanyadhalmanniwal-bayan
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Holder of blessings and manifestation.
(5) For Honour & Exaltation and Expedition of Important Affairs

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن تَوَاضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْء لِّعَظَمَتِهِيَا مَنْ اسْتَسلَمَ كُلُّ شَيْء لِّقُدْرَتِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man tawada`a kul-lu shayil-li-a'zamatihi ya manis-taslama kul-lu shayil-li-qud-ratih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He before Whose greatness everything bows,OHe before Whose power everything submits,
(6) For Blessings & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَيْء لِّعِزَّتِهِيَا مَنْ خَضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْء لِّهَيْبَتِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man dhal-la kul-lu shayil-li-i`iz-zatihyamankhada`akul-lushayillihaybatih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He before Whose might overshadows everything, O He before Whose awesomeness everything is humbled,
(6) For Blessings & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيْء مِّنْ خَشْيَتِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya manin-qada kul-lu shayim-min khash-yatih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He before Whose fearsomeness everything yields,
(6) For Blessings & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن تَشَقَّقَتِ الْجِبَالُ مِن مَّخَافَتِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yaman tashaq-qaqatil-jibalu mim-makhafatih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He before Whose terribleness mountains shake,
(6) For Blessings & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن قَامَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ بِأَمْرِهِ
يَامَنْ اسْتَقَرَّتِ الأَرَضُونَ بِإِذْنِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man qamatis-samawatu bi-am-rih ya manis-taqar-ratil-araduna biidhnih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He before Whose command the heavens are raised, O He through Whose permission in the earths are secured,
(6) For Blessings & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُبِحَمْدِهِيَا مَن لا يَعْتَدِي عَلَى أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose glory the thunder proclaims,
O He Who is never cruel to his subjects.
ya may-yusab-bihur-ra`a-du biham-dihya mal-laya`tadi`ala ah-limam-lakatih
(6) For Blessings & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا غَافِرَ الْخَطَايَايَا كَاشِفَ الْبَلاَيَا
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ghafiral-khataya ya kashifal-balaya
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Forgiver of sins, O Dispeller of tribulations,
(7) For Removal of Calamities & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مُنْتَهَىالرَّجَايَايَا مُجْزِلَ الْعَطَايَا
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mun-tahar-rajaya ya muj-zilal-a'taya
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Aim of hopes, O Giver of abundant gifts,
(7) For Removal of Calamities & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا وَاهِبَ الْهَدَايَايَا رَازِقَ الْبَرَايَا
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya wahibal-hadaya ya raziqal-baraya
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OBestowerof bounties, O Provider of creatures,
(7) For Removal of Calamities & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا قَاضِي الْمَنَايَايَا سَامِعَ الشَّكَايَا
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya qadiyal-manaya ya samia'ash-shakaya
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Judge of destinies, O Hearer of complaints,
(7) For Removal of Calamities & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا بَاعِثَ الْبَرَايَايَا مُطْلِقَ الأُسَارَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya bai`ithal-baraya ya mut-liqal-usara
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OResurrectorof creatures, O Freer of captives.
(7) For Removal of Calamities & Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْحَمْدِ وَالثَّنَاءِيَا ذَا الْفَخْرِ وَالْبَهَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-ham-di wath-thana-i ya dhal-fakh-ri wal-baha-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, to Whom is due all praise and adoration, O He, Who holds all pride and eminence,
(8) For Protection From Chastisement in this life and in life hereafter

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْمَجْدِ وَالسَّنَاءِيَا ذَا الْعَهْدِ وَالْوَفَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who holds allhonourand rank, O He, Who makes promises andhonoursthem,
ya dhal-maj-di was-sana-i ya dhal-a'h-di wal-wafa-i
(8) For Protection From Chastisement in this life and in life hereafter

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْعَفْوِ وَالرِّضَاءِيَا ذَا الْمَنِّ وَالْعَطَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-a'f-wi war-rida ya dhal-man-ni wal-a'ta-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who pardons and is content,
OHe, Who holds all abundance and provides,
(8) For Protection From Chastisement in this life and in life hereafter

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْفَصْلِ وَالْقَضَاءِيَا ذَا الْعِزِّ وَالْبَقَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-fas-li wal-qada-i ya dhal-i`iz-zi wal-baqa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who holds decision andjudgement, O He, Who is glorious and eternal,
(8) For Protection From Chastisement in this life and in life hereafter

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْجُودِ وَالسَّخَاءِيَا ذَا الآلاءِ وَالنَّعْمَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is liberal and munificent,
O He, Who holds all blessings and bounties,
ya dhal-judi was-sakha-i ya dhal-a-la-i wan-na`a-ma-i
(8) For Protection From Chastisement in this life and in life hereafter

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا مَانِعُ يَا دَافِعُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya maniu' ya dafiu'
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name: O Preventer of misfortune,
ORepellerof calamities.
(9) For Removal from Fear and Diseases

slides.arabic:
يَا رَافِعُ يَا صَانِعُيَا نَافِعُ يَا سَامِعُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
OBenefiter O Hearer,
ya rafiu' ya saniu’ ya nafiu' ya samiu'
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Elevator of rank, O Fashioner,
(9) For Removal from Fear and Diseases

slides.arabic:
يَا جَامِعُ يَا شَافِعُيَا وَاسِعُ يَا مُوسِعُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Aggregator, O Intercessor,
ya jamiu' ya shafiu’ ya wasiu' ya musiu'
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Magnanimous, O Increaser.
(9) For Removal from Fear and Diseases

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا صَانِعَ كُلِّ مصْنُوعيَّا خَاِلقَ كُلِّ مَخْلُوق
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya sania' kul-li ms-nui`in ya khaliqa kul-li makh-luq
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Fashioner of every fashioned thing,
O Creator of every created thing,
(10) For Acceptance of Duties

slides.arabic:
يَّا رَازِقَ كُلِّ مَرْزُوقيَّا مَاِلكَ كُلِّ مَمْلُوك
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya raziqa kul-li marzuq ya malika kul-li mam-luk
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Provider for every needy thing,
O Sovereign over all subjects,
(10) For Acceptance of Duties

slides.arabic:
يَّا كَاشِفَ كُلِّ مَكْرُوبيَّا فَاِرجَ كُلِّ مَهْمُوم
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya kashifa kul-li mak-rub ya farija kul-li mahum
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Dispeller of every hardship,
O Comforter of every griever,
(10) For Acceptance of Duties

slides.arabic:
يَّا رَاحِمَ كُلِّ مَرْحُوميَّا نَاصِرَ كُلِّ مَخْذُول
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rahima kul-li mar-hum ya nasira kul-li makh-dhul
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Merciful to every sufferer,
O Helper of everything forsaken,
(10) For Acceptance of Duties

slides.arabic:
يَّا سَاتِرَ كُلِّ مَعْيُوبيَّا مَلْجَأَ كُلِّ مَطْرُود
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya satira kul-li ma`a-yub ya mal-ja kul-li mat-rud
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Concealer of every blemished thing,
O Shelter for every exile.
(10) For Acceptance of Duties

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا عُدَّتِي عِنْدَ شِدَّتِييَا رَجَائِي عِنْدَ مُصِيبَتِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Provider in my hardship,
O Source of Hope in my misfortune,
ya u'd-dati i`inda shid-dati ya raja-i i`inda musibati
(11) For Protection from Vice and increase in Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَا مُؤْنِسِي عِنْدَ وَحْشَتِييَا صَاحِبِي عِنْدَ غُرْبَتِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mu-nisi i`inda wah-shati ya sahibi i`inda ghur-bati
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Companion in my isolation,
O FellowTravellerin my journey,
(11) For Protection from Vice and increase in Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَا وَلِيِّي عِنْدَ نِعْمَتِييَا غِيَاثِي عِنْدَ كُرْبَتِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya wali-yi i`inda nia'-mati ya ghiyathi i`inda kur-bati
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Friend in my ease,
O Rescuer from my trials,
(11) For Protection from Vice and increase in Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَا دَلِيلِي عِنْدَ حَيْرَتِييَا غِنَائِي عِنْدَ افْتِقَارِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Guide in my perplexity,
O Resource in my neediness,
ya dalili i`inda hayrati ya ghina-i i`indaf-tiqari
(11) For Protection from Vice and increase in Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَا مَلْجَئِي عِنْدَ اضْطِرَارِييَا مُعِينِي عِنْدَ مَفْزَعِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-jai i`indad-tirari ya mue'eni i`inda mafzae'e
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Shelter in my helplessness,
O Deliverer from my fears.
(11) For Protection from Vice and increase in Sustenance

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا عَلاَّمَ الْغُيُوبِيَا غَفَّارَ الذُّنُوبِ،
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya `al-lamal-ghuyub ya ghaf-faradh-dhunub
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Knower of the unseen,
O Forgiver of sins,
(12) For Protection from Calamities and for Good Fortune

slides.arabic:
يَا سَتَّارَ الْعُيُوبِيَا كَاشِفَ الْكُرُوبِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya sat-taral-u'yub ya kashifal-kurub
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Concealer of defects,
O Expeller of pain,
(12) For Protection from Calamities and for Good Fortune

slides.arabic:
يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِيَا طَبِيبَ الْقُلُوبِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya muqal-libal-qulub ya tabibal-qulub
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Transformer of the hearts
O Physician of the hearts,
(12) For Protection from Calamities and for Good Fortune

slides.arabic:
يَا مُنَوِّرَ الْقُلُوبِيَا أَنِيسَ الْقُلُوبِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya munaw-wiral-qulubi, ya anisal-qulub
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Illuminator of the hearts,
O Intimate of the hearts,
(12) For Protection from Calamities and for Good Fortune

slides.arabic:
يَا مُفَرِّجَ الْهُمُومِيَا مُنَفِّسَ الْغُمُومِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mufar-rijal-humum ya munaf-fisal-ghumum
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Dispeller of anxiety,
O Liberator from grief.
(12) For Protection from Calamities and for Good Fortune

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا جَلِيلُ يَا جَمِيلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Glorious, O Virtuous,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya jalilu ya jamil
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(13) For Removal of Eye Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا وَكِيلُ يَا كَفِيلُيَا دَلِيلُ يَا قَبِيلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Protector, O Patron,
O Guide, O Guarantor,
ya wakilu ya kafil ya dalilu ya qabil
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (13) For Removal of Eye Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا مُدِيلُ يَا مُنِيلُيَا مُقِيلُ يَا مُحِيلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mudilu ya munil ya muqilu ya muhil
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OBestowerof Wealth, OBestowerof blessings, OBestowerof strength, O Acceptor of repentance.
(13) For Removal of Eye Pain

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا دَلِيلَ الْمُتَحَيِّرِينَيَا غِيَاثَ الْمُسْتَغِيثِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dalilal-mutahay-yirin ya ghiyathal-mus-taghithin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Guide of the waylaid,
O Rescuer of those who appeal,
(14) For Increase of Wealth

slides.arabic:
يَا صَرِيخَ الْمُسْتَصْرِخِينَيَا جَارَ الْمُسْتَجِيرِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya sarikhal-mus-tas-rikhin ya jaral-mus-tajirin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Helper of those who call,
O Aider of those who call,
(14) For Increase of Wealth

slides.arabic:
يَا أَمَانَ الْخَائِفِينَيَا عَوْنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya amanal-kha-ifin ya `aw-nal-mu-minin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Shelter of the fearful,
OSuccourerof the faithful,
(14) For Increase of Wealth

slides.arabic:
يَا رَاحِمَ الْمَسَاكِينَيَا مَلْجَأَ الْعَاصِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rahimal-masakin ya mal-jal-a'asin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Merciful to the indigent,
O Refuge for the disobedient,
(14) For Increase of Wealth

slides.arabic:
يَا غَافِرَ الْمُذْنِبِينَيَا مُجِيبَ دَعْوَةِ الْمُضْطَرِّينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ghafiral-mudhnibin ya mujiba da`a-watil-madtar-rin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Forgiver of the sinner,
O Responder to the supplicant
(14) For Increase of Wealth

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْجُودِ وَالإِحْسَانِيَا ذَا الْفَضْلِوَالإمْتِنَانِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-judi wal-ih-san ya dhal-fadli wal-im-tinan
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of liberality and beneficence,
O Most gracious and obliging,
(15) For Increase of Blessings

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الأَمْنِ وَالأَمَانِيَا ذَا الْقُدْسِ وَالسُّبْحَانِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-am-ni wal-aman ya dhal-qud-si was-sub-han
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of peace and security,
O Most holy and above all defects,
(15) For Increase of Blessings

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْحِكْمَةِ وَالْبَيَانِيَا ذَا الرَّحْمَةِ وَالرِّضْوَانِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-hik-mati wal-bayan ya dhar-rah-mati war-ridwan
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of wisdom and manifestation,
O Master of mercy and satisfaction,
(15) For Increase of Blessings

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْحُجَّةِ وَالْبُرْهَانِيَا ذَا الْعَظَمَةِ وَالسُّلْطَانِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-huj-jati wal-bur-han ya dhal-a'zamati was-sul-tan
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of argument and proof,
O Master of grandeur and sovereignty,
(15) For Increase of Blessings

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الرَّأْفَةِ وَالْمُسْتَعَانِيَا ذَا الْعَفْوِ وَالْغُفْرَانِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhar-ra-fati wal-mus-ta`aan ya dhal-a'f-wi wal-ghuf-ran
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of kindness andsuccour,
O Master of pardon and forgiveness.
(15) For Increase of Blessings

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ رَبُّ كُلِّ شَيْءيَّا مَنْ هُوَ إِلَهُ كُلِّ شَيْء
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa rab-bu kul-li shay ya man huwa ilhu kul-li shay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is the Lord over all things,
O He, Who is theAllāhof all things,
(16) For Solution of Problems

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ خَاِلقُ كُلِّ شَيْءيَّا مَنْ هُوَ صَانِعُ كُلِّ شَيْء
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa khaliqu kul-li shay ya man huwa saniu' kul-li shay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is the Creator of all things,
O He. Who is the Fashioner of all things,
(16) For Solution of Problems

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ قَبْلَ كُلِّ شَيْءيَّا مَنْ هُوَ بَعْدَ كُلِّ شَيْء
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is thePrecederof allthings, OHe, Who is the Successor of all things,
yamanhuwaqablakullishayya man huwa ba`a-da kul-li shay
(16) For Solution of Problems

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيْءيَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَاِلمٌ بِكُلِّ شَيْء
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa faw-qa kul-li shay ya man huwa `aalimum bikul-li shay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is above all things,
O He, Who knows all things,
(16) For Solution of Problems

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ قَادِرٌ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءيَّا مَنْ هُوَ يَبْقَى وَيَفْنَى كُلُّ شَيْء
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa qadirun `ala kul-li shayyamanhuwayab-qawayaf-nakul-lushay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is Powerful over all things, O He, Who is the Sustainer and Extinguisher of all things,
(16) For Solution of Problems

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا مُؤْمِنُ يَا مُهَيْمِنُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya mu-minu ya muhaymin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
O Securer of safety, O Protector,

slides.arabic:
يَا مُكَوِّنُ يَا مُلَقِّنُيَا مُبَيِّنُ يَا مُهَوِّنُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
OBestowerof being, OBestowerof knowledge, OManifester, O Facilitator,
ya mukaw-winu ya mulaq-qin ya mubay-yinu ya muhaw-win
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (17) For All Difficult Affairs

slides.arabic:
يَا مُمَكِّنُ يَا مُزَيِّنُيَا مُعْلِنُ يَا مُقْسِّمُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mumak-kinu ya mu-zay-yin ya mua'-linu ya muq-s-sim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Provider of place, O Adorner,
O Proclaimer, O Distributor.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي مُلْكِهِ مُقِيمٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي سُلْطَانِهِ قَدِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi mul-kihi muqimya man huwa fi sul-tanihi qadim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Everlasting in His Kingdom,
O Eternal in His sovereignty,
(18) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي جَلاَلِهِ عَظِيمٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى عِبَادِهِ رَحِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi jalalihi `azim ya man huwa `ala i`ibadihi rahim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Greatest in His grandeur,
O Most Merciful to His servants,
(18) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيْء عَلِيمٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa bikul-li shay-in `alim ya man huwa biman `asahu halim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Knower of everything,
O Forbearing to him who disobeys Him,
(18) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَن رَّجَاهُ كَرِيمٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي صُنْعِهِ حَكِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa bimar-rajahu karim ya man huwa fi sun-i`ihi hakim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Magnanimous to him who places his hope in Him, O He Who is Wise over what He has fashioned,
(18) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ لَطِيفٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ قَدِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi hik-matihi latif ya man huwa fi lut-fihi qadim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who is Subtle in his Wisdom,
O He Who is Eternal in His Kindness.
(18) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يُرْجَى إِلاَّ فَضْلُهُيَا مَن لا يُسْأَلُ إِلاَّ عَفْوُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layur-jaillafadluhya mal-layus-aluilla `af-wuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, from Whom no hope is entertained save by His Grace,
OHe, from Whom nothing is begged save His Pardon,
(19) For Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يُنْظَرُ إِلاَّ بِرُّهُيَا مَن لا يُخَافُ إِلاَّ عَدْلُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layun-zaruillabir-ruhya mal-layukhafuilla `adluh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, of Whom nothing is seen save His Goodness, O He,fromWhom nothing is feared save His Justice,
(19) For Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يَدُومُ إِلاَّ مُلْكُهُيَا مَن لا سُلْطَانَ إِلاَّ سُلْطَانُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layadumuillamul-kuhya mal-la sul-tana illa sul-tanuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose sovereignty alone of eternal,
O He, Who alone has true majesty,
(19) For Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن وَّسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْء رَّحْمَتُهُيَا مَنْ سَبَقَتْ رَحْمَتُهُ غَضَبَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya maw-wasia't kul-la shay-ir-rah-matuh ya man sabaqat rah-matuhu ghadabah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose blessings extend to all,
O He, Whose Wrath is surpassed by His Mercy,
(19) For Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْء عِلْمُهُيَا مَن لَّيْسَ أَحَدٌ مِّثْلَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ahata bikul-li shay-in i`il-muhu ya mal-laysa ahadum-mith-lah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything, O He, Who is without equal,
(19) For Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا فَارِجَ الْهَمِّيَا كَاشِفَ الْغَمِّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya farijal-ham ya kashifal-gham
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Remover of anxiety,
O Expeller of sorrow,
(20) For Removal of Worries and For Happiness and Blessings

slides.arabic:
يَا غَافِرَ الذَّنْبِيَا قَابِلَ التَّوْبِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ghafiradh-dham-b ya qabilat-taw-b
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Forgiver of sins,
O Acceptor of repentance,
(20) For Removal of Worries and For Happiness and Blessings

slides.arabic:
يَا خَاِلقَ الْخَلْقِيَا صَادِقَ الْوَعْدِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khaliqal-khal-q ya sadiqal-wa`a-d
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Creator of creatures,
O Truthful in promises,
(20) For Removal of Worries and For Happiness and Blessings

slides.arabic:
يَا مُوفِي الْعَهْدِيَا عَالِمَ السِّرِّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mufi-yal-a'h-d ya `aalimas-sir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Fulfiller of promises,
O Knower of secrets,
(20) For Removal of Worries and For Happiness and Blessings

slides.arabic:
يَا فَاِلقَ الْحَبِّيَا رَازِقَ الأَنَامِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya faliqal-hab-b ya raziqal-anam
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Splitter of seed,
O Provider for creatures.
(20) For Removal of Worries and For Happiness and Blessings

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا عَلِيُّ يَا وَفِيُّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O High, O Perfect
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya `ali-yu ya wafi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(21) For Forgiveness of Sins

slides.arabic:
يَا غَنِيُّ يَا مَلِيُّيَا حَفِيُّ يَا رَضِيُّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Independent, O Rich,
O Kind, O Agreeable
ya ghani-yu ya mali ya hafi-yu ya radi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (21) For Forgiveness of Sins

slides.arabic:
يَا زَكِيُّ يَا بَدِيُّيَا قَوِيُّ يَا وَلِيُّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Purifier, O Eternal,
ya zaki-yu ya badi ya qawi-yu ya wali
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Mighty, O Friend.
(21) For Forgiveness of Sins

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ أَظْهَرَ الْجَمِيلَيَا مَنْ سَتَرَ الْقَبِيحَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man azharal-jamil ya man sataral-qabih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who reveals virtue,
O He, Who conceals vice,
(22) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّمْ يُؤَاخِذْ بِالْجَرِيرَةِيَا مَن لَّمْ يَهْتِكِ السِّتْرَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lam yuakhidh bial-jarirah ya mal-lam yah-tikis-sit-r
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who does not call to severe account for sins, O He, Who does not disclose the disgrace of his servants,
(22) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَا عَظِيمَ الْعَفْوِيَا حَسَنَ التَّجَاوُزِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya `azimal-a'f-wi ya hasanat-tajawuz
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is the best forgiver,
O He, Who overlookserrancy,
(22) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَا وَاسِعَ الْمَغْفِرَةِيَا بَاسِطَ الْيَدَيْنِ بِالرِّحْمَةِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya wasia'l-magh-firah ya basital-yadayni bilr-rih-mah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose forgiveness extends overall. OHe, Whose Hands are stretched forth in mercy,
(22) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
يَا صَاحِبَ كُلِّ نَجْوًىيَّا مُنْتَهَى كُلِّ شَكْوًى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya sahiba kul-li naj-waya mun-taha kul-li shak-wa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who knows all secrets,
O He, to Whom all complaints are directed.
(22) For Increase of Sustenance

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَّا ذَا النِّعْمَةِ السَّابِغَةِيَا ذَا الرَّحْمَةِ الْوَاسِعَةِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhan-nia'-matis-sabighah ya dhar-rah-matil-wasia'h
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of countless blessings,
O Master of limitless mercy,
(23) For Increase of Beneficence

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْمِنَّةِ السَّابِقَةِيَا ذَا الْحِكْمَةِ الْبَاِلغَةِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-min-natis-sabiqah ya dhal-hik-matil-balighah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master surpassing all obligation,
O Master of perfect wisdom,
(23) For Increase of Beneficence

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْقُدْرَةِ الْكَامِلَةِيَا ذَا الْحُجَّةِ الْقَاطِعَةِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-qud-ratil-kamilah ya dhal-huj-jatil-qatia'h
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of infinite might,
O Master of the decisive argument,
(23) For Increase of Beneficence

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْكَرَامَةِ الظَّاهِرَةِيَا ذَا الْعِزَّةِ الدَّائِمَةِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-karamatiz-zahirah ya dhal-i`iz-zatid-da-imah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of the manifest miracle,
O Master of perpetual prestige,
(23) For Increase of Beneficence

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِينَةِيَا ذَا الْعَظَمَةِ الْمَنِيعَةِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-qu-watil-matinah ya dhal-a'zamatil-mani-ya'h
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of great strength,
O Master of unsurpassable glory
(23) For Increase of Beneficence

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا بَدِيَعَ السَّمَاوَاتِيَا جَاعِلَ الظُّلُمَاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya badi-ya`as-samawat ya jai`ilaz-zulumat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Originator of the heavens,
O Maker of darkness,
(24) For the Pleasure of Allāh

slides.arabic:
يَا رَاحِمَ الْعَبَرَاتِيَا مُقِيلَ الْعَثَرَاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rahimal-a'baratya muqilal-a'tharat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Merciful to those who weep,
O He Who oversees slips and errors,
(24) For the Pleasure of Allāh

slides.arabic:
يَا سَاتِرَ الْعَوْرَاتِيَا مُحْيِي الأَمْوَاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya satiral-a'w-rat ya muh-yi-yal-am-wat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Concealer of defects,
O Reviver of the dead,
(24) For the Pleasure of Allāh

slides.arabic:
يَا مُنْزِلَ الآيَاتِيَا مُضَعِّفَ الْحَسَنَاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya munzilal-a-yat ya muda`a-ifal-hasanat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Revealer of signs,
O Increaser of virtue,
(24) For the Pleasure of Allāh

slides.arabic:
يَا مَاحِي السَّيِّئَاتِيَا شَدِيدَ النَّقِمَاتِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Who rubs out vices,
ya mahi-yas-say-yi-at ya shadidan-naqimat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who calls to account.
(24) For the Pleasure of Allāh

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا مُصَوِّرُ يَا مُقَدِّرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Fashioner, OPreordainer,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya musaw-wiru ya muqad-dir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(25) For Removal of Misfortune and for Gaining Good Fortune

slides.arabic:
يَا مُدَبِّرُ يَا مُطَهِّرُيَا مُنَوِّرُ يَا مُيَسِّرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Planner, O Purifier,
O Illuminator, O Facilitator,
ya mudab-biru ya mutah-hir ya munaw-wiru ya muyas-sir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (25) For Removal of Misfortune and for Gaining Good Fortune

slides.arabic:
يَا مُبَشِّرُ يَا مُنْذِرُيَا مُقَدِّمُ يَا مُؤَخِّرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mubash-shiru ya mundhir ya muqad-dimu ya muakh-hir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Giver of glad tidings, O Warner,
O Giver of precedence, OPostponer.
(25) For Removal of Misfortune and for Gaining Good Fortune

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ الْبَيْتِ الْحَرَامِيَا رَبَّ الشَّهْرِ الْحَرَامِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bal-baytil-haram ya rab-bash-shah-ril-haram
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of the Sanctuary,
O Lord of the holy month,
(26) For Cure of Fever

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ الْبَلَدِ الْحَرَامِيَا رَبَّ الرُّكْنِ وَالْمَقَامِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bal-baladil-haram ya rab-bar-ruk-ni wal-maqam
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of the Holy City,
O Lord of theRuknand theMaqam,
(26) For Cure of Fever

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ الْمَشْعَرِ الْحَرَامِيَا رَبَّ الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bal-mash-a'ril-harami ya rab-bal-mas-jidil-haram
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of theMashairof Mecca,
O Lord of the Holy Mosque in Mecca,
(26) For Cure of Fever

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ الْحِلِّ وَالْحَرَامِيَا رَبَّ النُّورِ وَالظَّلاَمِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bal-hil-li wal-haram ya rab-ban-nuri waz-zalam
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of what is lawful and what is proscribed,
O Lord of light and darkness,
(26) For Cure of Fever

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ التَّحِيَّةِ وَالسَّلاَمِيَا رَبَّ الْقُدْرَةِ فِي الأَنَامِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bat-tahi-yati was-salam ya rab-bal-qud-rati fil-anam
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of salutation and peace,
O Lord of strength among creatures.
(26) For Cure of Fever

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا أَحْكَمَ الْحَاكِمِينَيَا أَعْدَلَ الْعَادِلِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ah-kamal-hakimin ya a`a-dalal-a'adilin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Highest of all authorities,
O Most Just of all the just,
(27) For Fear from Rulers and Officers

slides.arabic:
يَا أَصْدَقَ الصَّادِقِينَيَا أَطْهَرَ الطَّاهِرِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya as-daqas-sadiqin ya at-harat-tahirin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Trustworthy of all the trustworthy,
O Purest of the pure,
(27) For Fear from Rulers and Officers

slides.arabic:
يَا أَحْسَنَ الْخَاِلقِينَيَا أَسْرَعَ الْحَاسِبِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Quickest Reckoner,
ya ah-sanal-khaliqin ya as-ra`al-hasibin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best of creators,
(27) For Fear from Rulers and Officers

slides.arabic:
يَا أَسْمَعَ السَّامِعِينَيَا أَبْصَرَ النَّاظِرِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya as-ma`as-samie'en ya ab-saran-nazirin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best of listeners,
O Most vigilant of invigilators,
(27) For Fear from Rulers and Officers

slides.arabic:
يَا أَشْفَعَ الشَّافِعِينَيَا أَكْرَمَ الأَكْرَمِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ash-fa`ash-shafie'en ya ak-ramal-ak-ramin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best of intercessors,
O Mosthonourableof all.
(27) For Fear from Rulers and Officers

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا عِمَادَ مَن لا عِمَادَ لَهُيَا سَنَدَ مَن لا سَنَدَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yai`imadamal-lai`imadalahya sanada mal-la sanadalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Supporter of the unsupported,
O Helper of the helpless,
(28) For Cure of Migraine

slides.arabic:
يَا ذُخْرَ مَن لا ذُخْرَ لَهُيَا حِرْزَ مَن لا حِرْزَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yadhukh-ramal-ladhukh-ralahyahirzamal-lahirzalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Protector of the unprotected,
O Shield for the defenseless,
(28) For Cure of Migraine

slides.arabic:
يَا غِيَاثَ مَن لا غِيَاثَ لَهُيَا فَخْرَ مَن لا فَخْرَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ghiyatha mal-laghiyatha lahyafakh-ramal-lafakh-ralah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Hearer of the unheard appeal,
O Pride of those without pride,
(28) For Cure of Migraine

slides.arabic:
يَا عِزَّ مَن لا عِزَّ لَهُيَا مُعِينَ مَن لا مُعِينَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
OHonourof thehonourless,
ya i`iz-za mal-la i`iz-za lahyamue'enamal-lamue'enalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Giver of Aid to the unaided,
(28) For Cure of Migraine

slides.arabic:
يَا أَنِيسَ مَن لا أَنِيسَ لَهُيَا أَمَانَ مَن لا أَمَانَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya anisa mal-la anisalahyaamanamal-laamanalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Friend of the forsaken,
O Shelter of theshelterless.
(28) For Cure of Migraine

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا عَاصِمُ يَا قَائِمُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Protector, O Persistent,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya `aasimu ya qa-im
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(29) To Build up Defense

slides.arabic:
يَا دَائِمُ يَا رَاحِمُيَا سَالِمُ يَا حَاكِمُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Eternal, O Merciful,
ya da-imu ya rahim ya salimu ya hakim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Accorder of peace,
(29) To Build up Defense

slides.arabic:
يَا عَالِمُ يَا قَاسِمُيَا قَابِضُ يَا بَاسِطُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Omniscient, O Distributor,
ya `aalimu ya qasim ya qabidu ya basit
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Preventer, O Opener.
(29) To Build up Defense

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا عَاصِمَ مَنِاسْتَعْصَمَهُيَا رَاحِمَ مَنِ اسْتَرْحَمَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya `aasima manis-ta`a-samah ya rahima manis-tar-hamah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Protector of he who seeks His protection,
O Merciful to he who requests His mercy,
(30) For Success in War

slides.arabic:
يَا غَافِرَ مَنِ اسْتَغْفَرَهُيَا نَاصِرَ مَنِاسْتَنْصَرَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ghafira manis-tagh-farah ya nasira manis-tan-sarah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Forgiver of the implore His forgiveness,
O Helper of he who asks for His help,
(30) For Success in War

slides.arabic:
يَا حَافِظَ مَنِاسْتَحْفَظَهُيَا مُكْرِمَ مَنِاسْتَكْرَمَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya hafiza manis-tah-fazah ya muk-rima manis-tak-ramah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Protector of he who seeks His protection,
O Magnanimous to he who seeks His magnanimity,
(30) For Success in War

slides.arabic:
يَا مُرْشِدَ مَنِ اسْتَرْشَدَهُيَا صَرِيخَ مَنِاسْتَصْرَخَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mur-shida manis-tar-shadah ya sarikha manis-tas-rakhah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Guide for he who seeks His guidance,
O Giver of Aid to he who seeks His aid,
(30) For Success in War

slides.arabic:
يَا مُعِينَ مَنِاسْتَعَانَهُ،يَا مُغِيثَ مَنِ اسْتَغَاثَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mue'ena manis-ta`aana ya mughitha manis-taghathah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Helper of he who appeals to Him,
O Rescuer of he who appeals to Him,
(30) For Success in War

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا عَزِيزاً لا يُضَامُيَا لَطِيفاً لا يُرَامُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya `azizal-la yudam ya latifal-la yuram
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Powerful Who is never overpowered,
O Benign Who is invisible,
(31) For Cure of Eye disease

slides.arabic:
يَا قَيُّوماً لا يَنَامُيَا دَائِماً لا يَفُوتُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Self-Subsistent Who never sleeps,
O Eternal Who never perishes,
ya qay-yumal-la yanam ya da-imal-la yafut
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (31) For Cure of Eye disease

slides.arabic:
يَا حَيّاً لا يَمُوتُيَا مَلِكاً لا يَزُولُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Ever-living Who never dies,
ya hay-yal-la yamut ya malikal-la yazul
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Monarch Whose rule is endless,
(31) For Cure of Eye disease

slides.arabic:
يَا بَاقِياً لا يَفْنَىيَا عَالِماً لا يَجْهَلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Omniscient Who never forgets,
ya baqiyal-la yaf-na ya `aalimal-la yaj-hal
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Eternal Who is imperishable,
(31) For Cure of Eye disease

slides.arabic:
يَا صَمَداً لا يُطْعَمُيَا قَوِيّاً لا يَضْعُفُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Independent Who needs no sustenance,
ya samadal-la yut-a'm ya qawi-yal-la yadu'f
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Mighty Who never weakens.
(31) For Cure of Eye disease

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا أَحَدُ يَا وَاحِدُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Unique, O One,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya ahadu ya wahid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(32) For Success over Enemies

slides.arabic:
يَا شَاهِدُ يَا مَاجِدُيَا حَامِدُ يَا رَاشِدُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Present, OPraiser,
O Exalted, O Guide,
ya shahidu ya majid ya hamidu ya rashid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (32) For Success over Enemies

slides.arabic:
يَا بَاعِثُ يَا وَارِثُيَا ضَارُّ يَا نَافِعُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
OResurrector, O Heir,
ya bai`ithu ya warith ya da-r-ru ya nafiu'
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Harmful to the unjust, O Beneficial to the just.
(32) For Success over Enemies

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا أَعْظَمَ مِنْ كُلِّ عَظِيميَّا أَكْرَمَ مِنْ كُلِّ كَرِيم
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya a`a-zama min kul-li `azim ya ak-rama min kul-li karimi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Grandest of all the grand,
O Most Magnanimous of all the magnanimous,
(33) For Attendance to Rulers

slides.arabic:
