يَّا أَرْحَمَ مِنْ كُلِّ رَحِيميَّا أَعْلَمَ مِنْ كُلِّ عَلِيم
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ar-hama min kul-li rahim ya a`a-lama min kul-li `alim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Merciful of all the merciful,
O Most Knowledgeable of all knowers,
(33) For Attendance to Rulers

slides.arabic:
يَّا أَحْكَمَ مِنْ كُلِّ حَكِيميَّا أَقْدَمَ مِنْ كُلِّ قَدِيم
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ah-kama min kul-li hakimya aq-dama min kul-li qadim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Wise of all the wise,
O Most Ancient of all the ancient,
(33) For Attendance to Rulers

slides.arabic:
يَّا أَكْبَرَ مِنْ كُلِّ كَبِيريَّا أَلْطَفَ مِنْ كُلِّ لَطِيف
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ak-bara min kul-li kabirya al-tafa min kul-li latif
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Great of all the great,
O Most Benign of all the benign,
(33) For Attendance to Rulers

slides.arabic:
يَّا أَجَلَّ مِنْ كُلِّ جَلِيليَّا أَعَزَّ مِنْ كُلِّ عَزِيز
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ajal-la min kul-li jalilya a`az-za min kul-li `aziz
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Magnificent of all the magnificent,
O Most Mighty of all the mighty.
(33) For Attendance to Rulers

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا كَرِيمَ الصَّفْحِيَا عَظِيمَ الْمَنِّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Greatest Benefactor,
ya karimas-saf-h ya `azimal-man
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Magnanimous in overlooking sins,
(34) For Safety fromJinsat Night

slides.arabic:
يَا كَثِيرَ الْخَيْرِيَا قَدِيمَ الْفَضْلِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya kathiral-khayr ya qadimal-fadli
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Bounteous in goodness,
O Eternal in grace,
(34) For Safety fromJinsat Night

slides.arabic:
يَا دَائِمَ اللُّطْفِ،يَا لَطِيفَ الصُّنْعِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya da-imal-lut-f ya latifas-sun-i`i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Eternal in subtlety,
O Creator of subtlety,
(34) For Safety fromJinsat Night

slides.arabic:
يَا مُنَفِّسَ الْكَرْبِيَا كَاشِفَ الضُّرِّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya munaf-fisal-kar-b ya kashifad-dur
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Remover of pain,
O Healer of injury,
(34) For Safety fromJinsat Night

slides.arabic:
يَا مَاِلكَ الْمُلْكِيَا قَاضِي الْحَقِّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya malikal-mulk ya qadi-yal-haq-q
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of dominion,
O True Judge.
(34) For Safety fromJinsat Night

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَهْدِهِ وَفِيٌّيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي وَفَائِهِ قَوِيٌّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi `ah-dihi wafi ya man huwa fi wafa-ihi qawi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He WhofulfilsHis promise,
O He Who is Strong in His fulfillment,
(35) For Cure of Toothache

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُوَّتِهِ عَلِيٌّيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عُلُوُّهِ قَرِيبٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi qu-watihi `ali ya man huwa fi u'lu-wuhi qarib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who is great in His might,
O He Who is near everyone in spite of His greatness,
(35) For Cure of Toothache

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُرْبِهِ لَطِيفٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ شَرِيفٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi qur-bihi latif ya man huwa fi lut-fihi sharif
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who is benign in His weariness,
O He Who is noble in His benignity,
(35) For Cure of Toothache

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي شَرَفِهِ عَزِيزٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عِزِّهِ عَظِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi sharafihi `azizya man huwa fi i`iz-zihi `azim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who is powerful in His nobility,
O He Who is great in His power,
(35) For Cure of Toothache

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ مَجِيدٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي مَجْدِهِ حَمِيدٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi `azamatihi majid ya man huwa fi maj-dihi hamid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who is exalted in His greatness,
O He Who is praiseworthy in his exaltation.
(35) For Cure of Toothache

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا كَافِي يَا شَافِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya kafi ya shafi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
O Sufficient, O Restorer of health,
(36) For Safeguard fromJins

slides.arabic:
يَا وَافِي يَا مُعَافِييَا هَادِي يَا دَاعِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Faithful, O Forgiver
O Guide, OSummoner,
ya wafi ya mua'afi ya hadi ya dae'e
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (36) For Safeguard fromJins

slides.arabic:
يَا قَاضِي يَا رَاضِييَا عَاِلي يَا بَاقِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Judge, O Agreeable,
O High, O Eternal
ya qadi ya radi ya `aali ya baqi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (36) For Safeguard fromJins

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيْء خَاضِعٌ لَّهُيَا مَن كُلُّ شَيْء خَاشِعٌ لَّهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man kul-lu shay-in khadiu'l-lah ya man kul-lu shay-in khashiu'l-lah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He before Whom everything bows,
O He before Whom everything is humbled,
(37) To Conquer the War

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ كُلُّ شَيْء كَائِنٌ لَّهُيَا مَن كُلُّ شَيْء مَّوْجُودٌ بِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man kul-lu shay-in ka-inul-lah ya man kul-lu shayim-maw-judum bih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He for Whom everything exists,
O He to Whom everything owes its existence,
(37) To Conquer the War

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيْء مُّنِيبٌ إِلَيْهِيَا مَن كُلُّ شَيْء خَائِفٌ مِّنْهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man kul-lu shayim-munibun ilayh ya man kul-lu shay-in kha-ifum-minh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He to Whom everything returns,
O He of Whom everything is afraid,
(37) To Conquer the War

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن كُلُّ شَيْء قَائِمٌ بِهِيَا مَن كُلُّ شَيْء صَائِرٌ إِلَيْهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man kul-lu shay-in qa-imum bih ya man kul-lu shay-in sa-irun ilayh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O One to Whom everything owes its stability, O He towards Whom everything retreats,
(37) To Conquer the War

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ كُلُّ شَيْء يُّسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِيَا مَن كُلُّ شَيْء هَاِلكٌ إِلاَّ وَجْهَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man kul-lu shayi-yusab-bihu biham-dih ya man kul-lu shay-in halikun illa waj-hah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whom everything glorifies with praise,
O He besides Whom everything is perishable.
(37) To Conquer the War

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا مَفَرَّ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِيَا مَن لا مَفْزَعَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lamafar-raillailayhya mal-lamafza`aillailayh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-there is no retreat but towards Him,
O He-there is no place of protection except with Him,
(38) To seek Allāh’s help

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا مَقْصَدَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِيَا مَن لا مَنجَىً مِنْهُ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lamaq-sadaillailayhya mal-lamanjaminhuillailayhi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He—there is no right path except that which leads to Him,
OHe-there is no shelter against Him but with Him,
(38) To seek Allāh’s help

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يُرْغَبُ إِلاَّ إلَيهِيَا مَن لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layur-ghabuillailayhiya mal-lahawlawalaqu-wataillabih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-there is no inclination towards anyone except Him,
OHe-there is no strength and vigor but from Him,
(38) To seek Allāh’s help

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يُسْتَعَانُ إِلاَّ بِهِيَا مَن لا يُتَوَكَّلُ إِلاَّ عَلَيْهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layus-ta`aanuillabihya mal-layutawak-kaluilla `alayh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-none is invoked for help but He.
O He-trust is not reposed in anyone but He,
(38) To seek Allāh’s help

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يُرْجَى إِلاَّ هُوَيَا مَن لا يُعْبَدُ إِلاَّ هُوَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layur-jaillahuwaya mal-layua'baduillahuwa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-hope is not entertained from anyone except from He,
OHe-none is worshipped except He
(38) To seek Allāh’s help

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ الْمَرْهُوبِينَيَا خَيْرَ الْمَرْغُوبِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayral-mar-hubin ya khayral-mar-ghubin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best of those who are feared,
O Best of those who are liked,

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ الْمَطْلُوبِينَيَا خَيْرَ الْمَسْؤُولِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayral-mat-lubin ya khayral-mas-ulin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best of those who are sought,
O Best of those who are entreated,

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ الْمَقْصُودِينَيَا خَيْرَ الْمَذْكُورِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayral-maq-sudin ya khayral-madhkurin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best of those who are longed for,
O Best of those who are remembered,

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ الْمَشْكُورِينَيَا خَيْرَ الْمَحْبُوبِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayral-mash-kurin ya khayral-mah-bubin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best of those to whom thanks are offered,
O Best of those who are loved,

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ الْمَدْعُوِّينَيَا خَيْرَ الْمُسْتَأْنِسِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayral-mad-o'o-win ya khayral-mus-ta-nisin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best of those who are called on,
O Best of those who are held in affection.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا غَافِرُ يَا سَاتِرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya ghafiru ya satir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I entreat You in Your name
O Forgiver, O Concealer [of defects]
(40) To seek Forgiveness

slides.arabic:
يَا قَادِرُ يَا قَاهِرُ يَا فَاطِرُيَا كَاسِرُ يَا جَابِرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Mighty, O Supreme, O Creator,
OShatterer, O Joiner,
yaqadiruyaqa-hiruyafatiryakasiruyajabir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (40) To seek Forgiveness

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَاكِرُ يَا نَاظِرُ يَا نَاصِرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yadhakiruyanaziruyanasir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OHe who Remembers,O Seeing, O Helper.
(40) To seek Forgiveness

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ فَسَوَّىيَا مَن قَدَّرَ فَهَدَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man khalaqa fasaw-wa ya man qad-dara fahada
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who created and perfected,
O He Who made everything to measure and guided,
(41) For Cure of Sun Stroke

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّكْشِفُ الْبَلْوَىيَا مَن يَّسْمَعُ النَّجْوَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yak-shiful-bal-wa ya may-yas-mau'n-naj-wa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who removes misfortunes,
O He Who overhears secrets,
(41) For Cure of Sun Stroke

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّنْقِذُ الْغَرْقَىيَا مَن يُّنجِيالْهَلْكَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yun-qidhul-ghar-qa ya may-yunjil-hal-ka
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who rescues the drowning,
O He Who saves the distressed,
(41) For Cure of Sun Stroke

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّشْفِي الْمَرْضَىيَا مَنْ أَضْحَكَ وَأَبْكَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yash-fil-mar-daya man adhaka wa ab-ka
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who restores the sick to health,
O He who makes [His slaves] laugh and weep,
(41) For Cure of Sun Stroke

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ أَمَاتَ وَأَحْيَايَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الزَّوْجَيْنِ الذَّكَرَ وَالأُنْثَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yamanamatawaah-ya yamankhalaqaz-zaw-jaynidh-dhakarawaluntha
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who causes to dies and calls to life,
O He Who has created pairs of male and female.
(41) For Cure of Sun Stroke

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن فِي الْبَرِّ وَالْبَحْرِ سَبِيلُهُيَا مَن فِي الآفَاقِ آيَاتُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man fil-bar-ri wal-bah-ri sabiluh ya man fil-a-faqi a-yatuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose course is on land and in water,
O He Whose signs are in the universe,
(42) For Safeguard from Calamities

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن فِي الآيَاتِ بُرْهَانُهُيَا مَن فِي الْمَمَاتِ قُدْرَتُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man fil-a-yati bur-hanuh ya man fil-mamati qud-ratuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He in Whose signs are undeniable proofs,OHe Whose; might is exhibited in causing death,
(42) For Safeguard from Calamities

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن فِي الْقُبُورِ عِبْرَتُهُيَا مَن فِي الْقِيَامَةِ مُلْكُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man fil-quburi i`ib-ratuh ya man fil-qiyamati mul-kuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose lesson is in graves, O He Whose kingdom will be on the Day ofJudgement,
(42) For Safeguard from Calamities

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن فِي الْحِسَابِ هَيْبَتُهُيَا مَن فِي الْمِيزَانِ قَضَاؤُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man fil-hisabi haybatuh ya man fil-mizani qada-uh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He in Whose reckoning of deeds is His dread, O He in Whose balance is His order,
(42) For Safeguard from Calamities

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن فِي الْجَنَّةِ ثَوَابُهُيَا مَن فِي النَّارِ عِقَابُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man fil-jan-nati thawabuh ya man fin-nari i`iqabuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose paradise is the place of His good reward, O He Whose hell is the place of chastisement.
(42) For Safeguard from Calamities

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَهْرَبُ الْخَائِفُونَيَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَفْزَعُ الْمُذْنِبُونَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ilayhi yah-rabul-kha-ifun ya man ilayhi yafzau'l-mudhnibun
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-the frightened flee to Him,
O He-sinners take shelter with Him,
(43) For Benevolence from Wealthy Person

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَقْصِدُ الْمُنِيبُونَيَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَرْغَبُ الزَّاهِدُونَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ilayhi yaq-sidul-munibun ya man ilayhi yar-ghabuz-zahidun
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-the repentant return to Him,
O He-the pious incline towards Him,
(43) For Benevolence from Wealthy Person

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَلْجَأُ الْمُتَحَيِّرُونَيَا مَنْ بِهِ يَسْتَأْنِسُ الْمُرِيدُونَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ilayhi yal-jaul-mutahay-yirunya mam bihi yas-ta-nisul-muridun
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-the confounded seek shelter in Him,
O He-the desirous have affliction for Him,
(43) For Benevolence from Wealthy Person

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ بِهِ يَفْتَخِرُ الْمُحِبُّونَيَا مَن فِي عَفْوِهِ يَطْمَعُ الْخَاطِئُونَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mam bihi yaf-takhirul-muhib-bun ya man fi `af-wihi yat-mau'l-khati-un
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-lovers are proud of Him,
OHe-transgressors have agreed for His forgiveness,
(43) For Benevolence from Wealthy Person

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَسْكُنُ الْمُوقِنُونَيَا مَنْ عَلَيَهِ يَتَوَكَّلُ الْمُتَوَكِّلُونَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ilayhi yas-kunul-muqinun ya man `alayahi yatawak-kalul-mutawak-kilun
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-those who are sure in faith receive consolation from Him, O He-those who trust Him rely on Him.
(43) For Benevolence from Wealthy Person

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا حَبِيبُ يَا طَبِيبُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Friend, O physician,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya habibu ya tabib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I entreat You in Your name
(44) To cultivate love

slides.arabic:
يَا قَرِيبُ يَا رَقِيبُيَا حَسيِبُ يَا مُهِيبُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Near, O Supervisor,
ya qaribu ya raqib ya hasibu ya muhib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Reckoner to account, O the One who causes Fear,
(44) To cultivate love

slides.arabic:
يَا مُثِيبُ يَا مُجِيبُيَا خَبِيرُ يَا بَصِيرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ORewarder, O Acceptor,
ya muthibu ya mujib ya khabiru ya basir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Aware, O All-Seeing.
(44) To cultivate love

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا أَقْرَبَ مِنْ كُلِّ قَرِيبيَّا أَحَبَّ مِنْ كُلِّ حَبِيب
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yaaqraba minkulliqaribyaahab-baminkullihabib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Nearest of all,
O Friendliest of all the friends,
(45) To Dispel from Fearful Dreams

slides.arabic:
يَّا أَبْصَرَ مِنْ كُلِّ بَصِيريَّا أَخْبَرَ مِنْ كُلِّ خَبِير
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ab-sara min kul-li basirya akh-bara min kul-li khabir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Possessor Of greater insight than all others,
O Most Aware of all
(45) To Dispel from Fearful Dreams

slides.arabic:
يَّا أَشْرَفَ مِنْ كُلِّ شَرِيفيَّا أَرْفَعَ مِنْ كُلِّ رَفِيع
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ash-rafa min kul-li sharifya ar-fa`a min kul-li rafii`in
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Noblest of all the nobles,
O Most Exalted of all the exalted,
(45) To Dispel from Fearful Dreams

slides.arabic:
يَّا أَقْوَى مِنْ كُلِّ قَوِيّيَّا أَغْنَى مِنْ كُلِّ غَنِيّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya aq-wa min kul-li qawi ya agh-na min kul-li ghani
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Mightiest of all mighty,
O Most Independent of all,
(45) To Dispel from Fearful Dreams

slides.arabic:
يَّا أَجْوَدَ مِنْ كُلِّ جَوَاديَّا أَرْأَفَ مِنْ كُلِّ رَؤُوف
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya aj-wada min kul-li jawadya ar-afa min kul-li ra’uf
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Generous of all,
O Kindest of all those who are kind
(45) To Dispel from Fearful Dreams

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا غَاِلباً غَيْرَ مَغْلُوبيَّا صَانِعاً غَيْرَ مَصْنُوع
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ghaliban ghayra magh-lub ya sania'an ghayra mas-nui`in
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Dominant who is not overpowered,
O Designer who is not made.
(46) For Cure of Infantile Paralysis

slides.arabic:
يَّا خَاِلقاً غَيْرَ مَخْلُوقيَّا مَاِلكاً غَيْرَ مَمْلُوك
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khaliqan ghayra makh-luq ya malikan ghayra mam-luk
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Creator who is not created,
O Master and not the slave,
(46) For Cure of Infantile Paralysis

slides.arabic:
يَّا قَاهِراً غَيْرَ مَقْهُوريَّا رَافِعاً غَيْرَ مَرْفُوع
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya qahiran ghayra maq-hur ya rafia'an ghayra mar-fui`in
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O All-Dominant who is not dominated,
O Exalter and the Exalted,
(46) For Cure of Infantile Paralysis

slides.arabic:
يَّا حَافِظاً غَيْرَ مَحْفُوظيَّا نَاصِراً غَيْرَ مَنْصُور
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Protector who needs no protection,
O Helper who needs no help,
ya hafizan ghayra mah-fuzin ya nasiran ghayra man-sur
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (46) For Cure of Infantile Paralysis

slides.arabic:
يَّا شَاهِداً غَيْرَ غَائِبيَّا قَرِيباً غَيْرَ بَعِيد
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya shahidan ghayra gha-ib ya qariban ghayra bae'ed
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Witness who is not absent,
O Near who is not distant.
(46) For Cure of Infantile Paralysis

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا نُورَ النُّورِيَا مُنَوِّرَ النُّورِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya nuran-nur ya munaw-wiran-nur
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Light of lights,
O Illuminator of light,
(47) For Cure from Epilepsy

slides.arabic:
يَا خَاِلقَ النُّورِيَا مُدَبِّرَ النُّورِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khaliqan-nur ya mudab-biran-nuri
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Creator of light
O Planner of light,
(47) For Cure from Epilepsy

slides.arabic:
يَا مُقَدِّرَ النُّورِيَا نُورَ كُلِّ نُور
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya muqad-diran-nur ya nura kul-li nur
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Estimator of light,
O Light of all lights,
(47) For Cure from Epilepsy

slides.arabic:
يَّا نُوراً قَبْلَ كُلِّ نُوريَّا نُوراً بَعْدَ كُلِّ نُور
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya nuran qab-la kul-li nurya nuram ba`a-da kul-li nur
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Light that precedes in existence every light,
O Light that will survive all lights,
(47) For Cure from Epilepsy

slides.arabic:
يَّا نُوراً فَوْقَ كُلِّ نُوريَّا نُوراً لَّيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ نُورٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya nuran faw-qa kul-li nur ya nural-laysa kamith-lihi nur
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Light that is above every light,
O Light like of which there is no light.
(47) For Cure from Epilepsy

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ عَطَاؤُهُ شَرِيفٌيَّا مَن فِعْلُهُ لَطِيفٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man `ata-uhu sharif ya man fia'-luhu latif
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose gift is noble,
O He Whose action is subtle,
(48) For Cure from Body Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لُّطْفُهُ مُقِيمٌيَّا مَنْ إِحْسَانُهُ قَدِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lut-fuhu muqim ya man ih-sanuhu qadim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose kindness is persistent,
O He Whose beneficence is eternal,
(48) For Cure from Body Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن قَوْلُهُ حَقٌّيَّا مَن وَّعْدُهُ صِدْقٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man qaw-luhu haqq ya maw-wa`a-duhu sidq
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose word is right,
O He Whose promise is true,
(48) For Cure from Body Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ عَفْوُهُ فَضْلٌيَّا مَنْ عَذَابُهُ عَدْلٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man `af-wuhu fazl ya man `adhabuhu `ad-l
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose forgiveness is a grace,
O He Whose chastisement is justice,
(48) For Cure from Body Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ ذِكْرُهُ حُلْوٌيَّا مَن فَضْلُهُ عَمِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man dhik-ruhu hulu ya man fadluh `amim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose remembrance is sweet,
O He Whose grace is universal.
(48) For Cure from Body Ailments

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا مُسَهِّلُ يَا مُفَصِّلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Facilitator, O Separator,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya musah-hilu ya mufas-sil
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I entreat You in Your name
(49) For Cure from Palpitation of Heart

slides.arabic:
يَا مُبَدِّلُ يَا مُذَلِّلُيَا مُنَزِّلُ يَا مُنَوِّلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Degrader, O Benefactor,
ya mubad-dilu ya mudhal-lil ya munaz-zilu ya munaw-wil
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAlterer, O Humiliating of the proud,
(49) For Cure from Palpitation of Heart

slides.arabic:
يَا مُفْضِلُ يَا مُجْزِلُيَا مُمْهِلُ يَا مُجْمِلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya muf-dilu ya mujzil ya mum-hilu ya muj-mil
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Munificent, O Giver of respite,
O Grantor of respite, O Virtuous,
(49) For Cure from Palpitation of Heart

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّرَى وَلا يُرَىيَا مَن يَّخْلُقُ وَلا يُخْلَقُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yara wa-la yura ya may-yakh-luqu wa-la yukh-laqu
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who sees but is not seen,
O He Who creates and is not created,
(50) For Increase of Eye Sight

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّهْدِي وَلا يُهْدَىيَا مَن يُّحْيِي وَلا يُحْيَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yah-di wa-la yuh-da ya may-yuh-yi wa-la yuh-yia
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who guides and is not guided,
O He Who receives to life and is not brought to life,
(50) For Increase of Eye Sight

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّسْأَلُ وَلا يُسْأَلُيَا مَن يُّطْعِمُ وَلا يُطْعَمُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yas-alu wa-la yus-al ya may-yut-i`imu wa-la yut-a'm
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who questions and is not questioned,
O He Who feeds and does not eat,
(50) For Increase of Eye Sight

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّجِيرُ وَلا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِيَا مَن يَّقْضِي وَلا يُقْضَى عَلَيْهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yujiru wa-la yujaru `ailayh ya may-yaq-di wa-la yuq-da `ailayh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who gives protection and is in no need of protection, O He Who judges and against Whom nojudgementis passed,
(50) For Increase of Eye Sight

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّحْكُمُ وَلا يُحْكَمُ عَلَيْهِيَا مَن لَّمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yah-kumu wa-la yuh-kamu `ailayhya mallamyaliduwalamyulad
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who commands but is not commanded: O He Who begets not, nor is He begotten,
(50) For Increase of Eye Sight

slides.arabic:
وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
wa-lam yakul-lahu kufuan ahad
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
And there is none like unto Him.
(50) For Increase of Eye Sight

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا نِعْمَ الْحَسِيبُيَا نِعْمَ الطَّبِيبُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Best reckoner,
O Best physician,
ya nia'-mal-hasib ya nia'-mat-tabib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (51) For Safeguard from Wickedness of Enemy

slides.arabic:
يَا نِعْمَ الرَّقِيبُيَا نِعْمَ القَرِيبُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Best guardian,
O Best near one,
ya nia'-mar-raqib ya nia'-mal-qarib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (51) For Safeguard from Wickedness of Enemy

slides.arabic:
يَا نِعْمَ المُجِيبُيَا نِعْمَ الحَبِيبُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Best responder,
O Best friend,
ya nia'-mal-mujib ya nia'-mal-habib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (51) For Safeguard from Wickedness of Enemy

slides.arabic:
يَا نِعْمَ الكَفِيلُيَا نِعْمَ الوَكِيلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Best surety,
O Best protector,
ya nia'-mal-kafil ya nia'-mal-kafil
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (51) For Safeguard from Wickedness of Enemy

slides.arabic:
يَا نِعْمَ المَوْلىَيَا نِعْمَ النَّصِيرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Best master,
ya nia'-mal-wakil ya nia'-mal-wakil
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best helper.
(51) For Safeguard from Wickedness of Enemy

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا سُرُورَ الْعَارِفِينَيَا مُنَى الْمُحِبِّينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya surural-a'arifin ya munal-muhib-bin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Joy of saints,
O Desire of friends.
(52) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
يَا أَنِيسَ الْمُرِيدِينَيَا حَبِيبَ التَّوَّابِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya anisal-muridin ya habibat-taw-wabin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Friend of seekers,
O Friend of penitents,
(52) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
يَا رَازِقَ الْمُقِلِّينَيَا رَجَاءَ الْمُذْنِبِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya raziqal-muqil-lin ya raja-al-mudhnibin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Provider of sustenance to the poor,
O Hope of sinners,
(52) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
يَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِ الْعَابِدِينَيَا مُنَفِّسَ عَنِ الْمَكْرُوبِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya qur-rata `aynil-a'abidin ya munaf-fisa `anil-mak-rubin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Coolness of worshippers' eyes,
O Remover Of sufferers' pain,
(52) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
يَا مُفَرِّجَ عَنِ الْمَغْمُومِينَيَا إِلَهَ الأَوَّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mufar-rija `anil-magh-mumin ya ilahal-aw-walina wal-a-khirin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Dispeller of the sorrows of the sorrowful,
OAllāhof the first and the last generation.
(52) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا رَبَّنَا يَا إِلَهَنَا
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya rab-bana ya ilhana
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I entreat You in Your name
O our Lord, O ourAllāh,

slides.arabic:
يَا سَيِّدَنَا يَا مَوْلانَايَا نَاصِرَنَا يَا حَافِظَنَا
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya say-yidana ya maw-lana ya nasirana ya hafizana
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O our Chief, O our Master,
O our Helper, O our Protector,

slides.arabic:
يَا دَلِيلَنَا يَا مُعِينَنَايَا حَبِيبَنَا يَا طَبِيبَنَا
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dalilana ya mue'enana ya habibana ya tabibana
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O our Guide, O our Aider,
O our Friend, O our Physician.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ النَّبِيِّينَ وَالأَبْرَارِيَا رَبَّ الصِّدِّيقِينَ وَالأَخْيَارِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-ban-nabi-yina wal-ab-rar ya rab-bas-sid-diqina wal-akh-yar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of the prophets and the virtuous,
O Lord of the righteous and chosen one,

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ الجَنَّةِ وَالنَّارِيَا رَبَّ الصِّغَارِ وَالْكِبَارِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bal-jan-nati wan-nar ya rab-bas-sighari wal-kibar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of paradise and hell,
O Lord of the small and the great,

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ الْحُبُوبِ وَالثِّمَارِيَا رَبَّ الأَنْهَارِ وَالأَشْجَارِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yarab-bal-hububi wath-thimar yarab-bal-an-hari wal-ash-jar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of grains and fruits,
O Lord of canals and trees,

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ الصَّحَارِي وَالْقِفَارِيَا رَبَّ الْبَرَارِي وَالْبِحَارِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bas-sahari wal-qifar ya rab-bal-barari wal-bihari
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of forest and desert,
O Lord of lands and seas,

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِيَا رَبَّ الإِعْلاَنِ وَالإِسْرَارِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bal-layli wan-nahar ya rab-bal-ia'-lani wal-is-rar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of night and day,
O Lord of the manifest and the hidden.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن نَّفَذَ فِي كُلِّ شَيْء أَمْرُهُيَا مَن لَّحِقَ بِكُلِّ شَيْء عِلْمُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man-nafadha fi kul-li shay-in am-ruhya mallahiqa bikul-li shay-in i`il-muh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose command operates in everything, O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything,
(55) To Cure Pain in Ribs

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ بَلَغَتْ إِلَى كُلِّ شَيْء قُدْرَتُهُيَا مَن لا يُحْصِي الْعِبَادُ نِعَمَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose control extends to everything, O He, Whose bounties cannot be counted by His slaves,
yamambalaghatilakulli shay-inqud-ratuhyamal-layuh-sil-i`ibadunia'mah
(55) To Cure Pain in Ribs

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا تَبْلُغُ الْخَلائِقُ شُكْرَهُيَا مَن لا تُدْرِكُ الأَفْهَامُ جَلاَلَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la tab-lughul-khala-iqu shuk-rah ya mal-la tud-rikul-af-hamu jalalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whom His creatures cannot adequately thank, O He, Whose grandeur cannot be comprehended by the intellect,
(55) To Cure Pain in Ribs

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا تَنَالُ الأَوْهَامُ كُنْهَهُيَا مَنِ الْعَظَمَةُ وَالْكِبْرِيَاءُ رِدَاؤُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la tanalul-aw-hamu kun-hah ya manil-a'zamatu wal-kib-ri-ya-u rida-uh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose reality cannot be acquired by the imagination, O He, Whose garb is majesty and greatness,
(55) To Cure Pain in Ribs

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يَرُدُّ الْعِبَادُ قَضَاءَهُيَا مَن لا مُلْكَ إِلا مُلْكُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la yarud-dul-i`ibadu qada-ahya mal-lamul-kaillamul-kuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whosejudgementcannot be reversed by His slave, O He, Whose alone is the kingdom and no one else'
(55) To Cure Pain in Ribs

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا عَطَاءَ إِلا عَطَاؤُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la `ata-a illa `ata-uh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose alone is the gift and none else's,
(55) To Cure Pain in Ribs

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ الْمَثَلُ الأَعْلَىيَا مَن لَّهُ الصِّفَاتُ الْعُلْيَا
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahul-mathalul-a`a-la ya mal-lahus-sifatul-u'l-ya
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, for Whom are noblest examples,
O He, for Whom are high attributes,
(56) For Cure from Diseases

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ الآخِرَةُ وَالأُولَىيَا مَن لَّهُ جَنَّةُ الْمَأْوَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahul-a-khiratu wal-ula ya mal-lahu jan-natul-ma-wa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is the Master of the beginning and the end, O He, Who is the Master of the abode of paradise,
(56) For Cure from Diseases

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ الآيَاتُ الْكُبْرَىيَا مَن لَّهُ الأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahul-a-yatul-kub-ra ya mal-lahul-as-ma-ul-hus-na
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, for Whom are great signs,
O He, for Whom are beautiful names,
(56) For Cure from Diseases

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ الْحُكْمُ وَالْقَضَاءُيَا مَن لَّهُ الْهَوَاءُ وَالْفَضَاءُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahul-huk-mu wal-qada-u ya mal-lahul-hawa-u wal-fada-u
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, for Whom is order andjudgement,
O He, Who rules over the atmosphere and the expanse,
(56) For Cure from Diseases

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ الْعَرْشُ وَالثَّرَىيَا مَن لَّهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ الْعُلَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahul-a'r-shu wath-thara ya mallahus-samawatul-u'la
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose is the Lordship of the highest heaven and the earth,
OHe, Who is the Master of the high heavens.
(56) For Cure from Diseases

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا عَفُوُّ يَا غَفُورُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Pardoner, O Forgiver,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya `afu-wu ya ghafur
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I entreat You in Your name
(57) For Removal of Wind Storms

slides.arabic:
يَا صَبُورُ يا شَكُورُيَا رَؤُوفُ يَا عَطُوفُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Kind, O Sympathetic,
ya saburu ya shakur ya ra’ufu ya `atuf
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Patient, O Greatest appreciator (of good),
(57) For Removal of Wind Storms

slides.arabic:
يَا مَسْؤُولُ يَا وَدُودُيَا سُبُّوحُ يَا قُدُّوسُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Besought, O Friend,
ya mas-ulu ya wadud ya sub-buhu ya qud-dus
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Glorified, O Most Holy.
(57) For Removal of Wind Storms

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن فِي السَّماءِ عَظَمَتُهُيَا مَن فِي الأَرْضِ آيَاتُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man fis-sama-i `azamatuh ya man fil-ar-di a-yatuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose greatness is in the heavens,
O He, Whose signs are on the earth,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن فِي كُلِّ شَيْء دَلائِلُهُيَا مَن فِي الْبِحَارِ عَجَائِبُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man fi kul-li shay-in dala-iluh ya man fil-bihari `aja-ibuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Whose proofs are manifest in everything, O He, Whose wonders are in the seas,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن فِي الْجِبَالِ خَزَائِنُهُيَا مَن يَّبْدَأُ الْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man fil-jibali khaza-inuh ya may-yabdaul-khal-qa thumma yue'eduh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Whose treasures are in the mountains, O He, Who originated Creation which then returns to Him,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَرْجِعُ الأَمْرُ كُلُّهُيَا مَنْ أَظْهَرَ فِي كُلِّ شَيْء لُّطْفَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ilayhi yar-jiu'l-am-ru kul-luh ya man azhara fi kul-li shayil-lut-fah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, towards Whom is the return of every matter, O, Whose Kindness is evident in everything,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ أَحْسَنَ كُلَّ شَيْء خَلَقَهُيَا مَن تَصَرَّفَ فِي الْخَلائِقِ قُدْرَتُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yaman ahsanakulla shay-inkhal-qahyamantasar-rafafil-khala-iqiqud-ratuh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Who makes best everything which He has created, O He, Whose authority is wielded over all creatures.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا حَبِيبَ مَن لا حَبِيبَ لَهُيَا طَبِيبَ مَن لا طَبِيبَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yahabibamal-lahabibalahyatabibamal-latabibalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Friend of he who has no friend,
O Physician of he who has no physician,

slides.arabic:
يَا مُجِيبَ مَن لا مُجِيبَ لَهُيَا شَفِيقَ مَن لا شَفِيقَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yamujibamal-lamujibalahyashafiqamal-lashafiqalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Responder to he who has no responder,
O Affectionate One to he whom none hold in affection,

slides.arabic:
يَا رَفِيقَ مَن لا رَفِيقَ لَهُيَا مُغِيثَ مَن لا مُغِيثَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yarafiqamal-larafiqalahyamughithamal-lamughithalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Friend of he who has no friend,
O Helper of he who has no help,

slides.arabic:
يَا دَلِيلَ مَن لا دَلِيلَ لَهُيَا أَنِيسَ مَن لا أَنِيسَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dalila mal-la dalila lahya anisa mal-la anisalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Guide of he who has no guide,
O Associate of the forlorn,

slides.arabic:
يَا رَاحِمَ مَن لا رَاحِمَ لَهُيَا صَاحِبَ مَن لا صَاحِبَ لَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yarahimamal-larahimalahyasahibamal-lasahibalah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Merciful One towards he on whom no one has mercy, O Companion of he who has no companion.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا كَافِي مَنِ اسْتَكْفَاهُيَا هَادِي مَنِ اسْتَهْدَاهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
OSufficerfor those who seek sufficiency,
ya kafiya manis-tak-fah ya hadiya manis-tah-dah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Guide for those who seek guidance,
(60) For Success in Important Affairs

slides.arabic:
يَا كَاِلئَ مَنِاسْتَكْلاَهُيَا رَاعِي مَنِ اسْتَرْعَاهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya kalia manis-tak-lah ya rae'ea manis-tar-a'ah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Protector for those who seek protection, O Granter for concession to those who seek concession,
(60) For Success in Important Affairs

slides.arabic:
يَا شَافِي مَنِ اسْتَشْفَاهُيَا قَاضِي مَنِ اسْتَقْضَاهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya shafiya manis-tash-fah ya qadiya manis-taq-dah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Healer for those who seek cure,
O Just One for those who seek justice,
(60) For Success in Important Affairs

slides.arabic:
يَا مُغْنِي مَنِ اسْتَغْنَاهُيَا مُوفِي مَنِ اسْتَوْفَاهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mugh-niya manis-tagh-nah ya mufiya manis-taw-fah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OBestowerof wealth for those who seek wealth, O Fulfiller of promises for those who seek fulfillment,
(60) For Success in Important Affairs

slides.arabic:
يَا مُقَوِّي مَنِ اسْتَقْوَاهُيَا وَلِيَّ مَنِ اسْتَوْلاهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya muqaw-wiya manis-taq-wah ya wali-ya manis-taw-lah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Granter of strength for those who seek strength, O Aider of those who seek aid.
(60) For Success in Important Affairs

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا خَاِلقُ يَا رَازِقُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya khaliqu ya raziq
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh, verily I entreat You in Your name
O Creator, O Provider of sustenance,
(61) For Satisfaction of Heart

slides.arabic:
يَا نَاطِقُ يَا صَادِقُيَا فَاِلقُ يَا فَارِقُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Splitter, O Separator,
ya natiqu ya sadiq ya faliqu ya fariq
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Creator of speech, O Truthful,
(61) For Satisfaction of Heart

slides.arabic:
يَا فَاتِقُ يَا رَاتِقُيَا سَابِقُ يَا سَامِقُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Breaker, O Combiner,
ya fatiqu ya ratiq ya sabiqu ya samiq
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Foremost, O Most High.
(61) For Satisfaction of Heart

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّقَلِّبُ اللَّيْلَ وَالنَّهَارَيَا مَن جَعَلَ الظُّلُمَاتِ وَالأَنْوَارَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yuqal-libul-layla wan-nahar ya man ja`alaz-zulumati wal-an-war
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who changes night and day,
O He, Who has created darkness and light,
(62) For Winning Hearts of the Right

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الظِّلَّ وَالْحَرُورَيَا مَنْ سَخَّرَ الشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَرَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man khalaqaz-zilla wal-harur ya man sakh-harash-sham-sa wal-qamar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has bestowed shade and heat,
O He, Who has brought into subjection the sun and the moon,
(62) For Winning Hearts of the Right

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن قَدَّرَ الْخَيْرَ وَالشَّرَّيَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الْمَوْتَ وَالْحَيَاةَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man qad-daral-khayra wash-shar ya man khalaqal-maw-ta wal-hayat
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has ordained virtue and vice,
O He, Who has created death and life,
(62) For Winning Hearts of the Right

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ الْخَلْقُ وَالأَمْرُيَا مَن لَّمْ يَتِّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَّلا وَلَداً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahul-khal-qu wal-am-rya mallamyat-tikhidhsahibatawwalawalada
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has made the body and the soul, O He, Who has neither taken a wife nor begotten any child,
(62) For Winning Hearts of the Right

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لَّيْسَ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي الْمُلْكِيَا مَن لَّمْ يَكُن لَّهُ وَلِيٌّ مِّنَ الذُّلِّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mallaysalahusharikunfilmulk ya mallamyakul-lahuwaliyumminadhdhull
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has no partner in His sovereignty, O He, Who has no friend among the disgraced.
(62) For Winning Hearts of the Right

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّعْلَمُ مُرَادَ الْمُرِيدِينَيَا مَن يَّعْلَمُ ضَمِيرَ الصَّاِمتِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-ya`a-lamu muradal-m-ruyidin ya may-ya`a-lamu damiras-samitin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who knows the desire of the desirous, O He, Who knows the conscience of the silent,
(63) For Profit in Business

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّسْمَعُ أَنِينَ الْوَاهِنِينَيَا مَن يَّرَى بُكَاءَ الْخَائِفِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yas-mau' aninal-wahinin ya may-yara buka-al-kha-ifin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, who hears the cries of the weak,
O He, Who sees the lamentation of the frightened,
(63) For Profit in Business

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّمْلِكُ حَوَائِجَ السَّائِلِينَيَا مَن يَّقْبَلُ عُذْرَ التَّائِبِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yam-liku hawa-ijas-sa-ilin ya may-yaq-balu u'dhrat-ta-ibin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who satisfies the needs of the petitioner, O He, Who accepts the excuse of the repentant,
(63) For Profit in Business

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يُصْلِحُ عَمَلَ الْمُفْسِدِينَيَا مَن لا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yus-lihu `amalal-muf-sidin ya mal-la yudiu' aj-ral-muh-sinin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who does not correct the actions of the mischievous,
OHe, Who does waste the good reward of the virtuous,
(63) For Profit in Business

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يَبْعُدُ عَن قُلُوبِ الْعَارِفِينَيَا أَجْوَدَ الأَجْوَدِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layab-u'du`anqulubil-a'arifinyaajwadal-ajwadin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is not absent from the mind of the saint, O the most Magnanimous of all those who show magnanimity.
(63) For Profit in Business

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا دَائِمَ الْبَقَاءِيَا سَامِعَ الدُّعَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Eternal Living,
ya da-imal-baqa-i ya samia'd-dua'a-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Hearer of prayers,
(64) For Cure of Temple Headache

slides.arabic:
يَا وَاسِعَ الْعَطَاءِيَا غَافِرَ الْخَطَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O LiberalBestower
ya wasia'l-a'ta-i ya ghafiral-khata-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Forgiver of sins,
(64) For Cure of Temple Headache

slides.arabic:
يَا بَدِيعَ السَّمَاءِيَا حَسَنَ البَلاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya badi-ya's-sama-i ya hasanal-bala-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Creator of the sky,
O Best tester of trials,
(64) For Cure of Temple Headache

slides.arabic:
يَا جَمِيلَ الثَّنَاءِيَا قَدِيمَ السَّنَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Most Praiseworthy,
O Eternally Great,
ya jamilath-thana-i ya qadimas-sana-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (64) For Cure of Temple Headache

slides.arabic:
يَا كَثِيرَ الْوَفَاءِيَا شَرِيفَ الْجَزَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya kathiral-wafa-i ya sharifal-jaza-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Greatest fulfiller of promises,
O BestRecompenser.
(64) For Cure of Temple Headache

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا سَتَّارُ يَا غَفَّارُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya sat-taru ya ghaf-far
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I entreat You in Your name
O Best concealer of defects, O Best forgiver,
(65) For Forgiveness of Sins

slides.arabic:
يَا قَهَّارُ يَا جَبَّارُيَا صَبَّارُ يَا بَارُّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Most dominant, O Supreme,
O Most patient, O Most virtuous,
ya qah-haru ya jab-bar ya sab-baru ya bar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (65) For Forgiveness of Sins

slides.arabic:
يَا مُخْتَارُ يَا فَتَّاحُيَا نَفَّاحُ يَا مُرْتَاحُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Most exalted, O Best opener,
ya mukh-taru ya fat-tah ya naf-fahu ya mur-tah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Blower of winds, OBestowerof Happiness.
(65) For Forgiveness of Sins

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ خَلَقَنِي وَسَوَّاِنييَا مَن رَّزَقَنِي وَرَبَّاِني
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man khalaqani wa saw-wani ya mar-razaqani wa rab-bani
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who created me and perfected me,
O He, Who provided me with sustenance and nurtured me,
(66) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ أَطْعَمَنِي وَسَقَاِنييَا مَن قَرَّبَنِي وَأَدْنَاِني
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man at-a'mani wa saqaniyamanqar-rabaniwaadnani
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who provided food for me and quenched my thirst, O He, Who brought me near Him and brought me most nigh,
(66) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ عَصَمَنِي وَكَفَاِنييَا مَنْ حَفَظَنِي وَكَلاَنِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man `asamani wa kafaniya man hafazani wa kalani
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who protected me and kept me in safety, O He, Who saved and guarded me,
(66) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ أَعَزَّنِي وَأَغْنَاِنييَا مَن وَّفَّقَنِي وَهَدَاِني
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man a`az-zani wa agh-naniyamawwaffaqaniwahadani
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whohonouredme and enriched me,
O He, Who helped and guided me,
(66) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ آنَسَنِي وَآوَاِنييَا مَنْ أَمَاتَنِي وَأَحْيَاِني
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man a-nasani wa a-waniyamanamataniwaahyani
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who befriended me and sheltered me,
O He, Who causes me to die and revivifies me.
(66) For Removal of Poverty

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّحِقُّ الْحَقَّ بِكَلِمَاتِهِيَا مَن يَّقْبَلُ التَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yuhiq-qul-haq-qa bikalimatih ya may-yaq-balut-taw-bata `an i`ibadih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who maintains truth by His words,
O He, Who accepts repentance from His slaves,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّحُولُ بَيْنَ الْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِيَا مَن لا تَنْفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ إِلا بِإِذْنِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yahulu baynal-mari wa qal-bihya mal-la tanfau'shshafa`atuillabi-idhnihi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Who stands between man and his heart, O He, without Whose permission intercession has no benefit,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَنْ سَبِيلِهِيَا مَن لا مُعَقِّبَ لِحُكْمِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa a`a-lamu biman dal-la `an sabilih ya mal-la mua'q-qiba lihuk-mih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Who knows well who is astray from His path, O He, Whose order no one can reverse,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا رَادَّ لِقَضَائِهِيَا مَنِ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيْء لأَمْرِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la ra-d-da liqada-ih ya man-inqada kul-lu shay-il-lam-rihi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whosejudgementno one can revoke,
O He, Whose order is obeyed by everything,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنِ السَّمَاوَاتُ مَطْوِيَّاتٌ بِيَمِينِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mans-samawatu mat-wi-yatum bi-yaminih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, in Whose Right Hand the heavens shall be rolled up,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّرْسِلُ الرِّيَاحَ بُشْريً بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yur-silur-riyaha bush-ram bayna yaday rah-matih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, who sends forth the winds bearing good tiding before his mercy,

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن جَعَلَ الأَرْضَ مِهَاداًيَّا مَن جَعَلَ الْجِبَالَ أَوْتَاداً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ja`alal-ar-da mihada ya man ja`alal-jibala aw-tada
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who sends forth the winds bearing good tiding before
OHe, Who has made the mountains pegs, His mercy.
(68) For Removal of Plague

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن جَعَلَ الشَّمْسَ سِرَاجاًيَّا مَن جَعَلَ الْقَمَرَ نُوراً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ja`alash-sham-sa siraja ya man ja`alal-qamara nura
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has made the sun a lamp,
O He, Who has made the moon a light,
(68) For Removal of Plague

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن جَعَلَ اللَّيْلَ لِبَاساًيَّا مَن جَعَلَ النَّهَارَ مَعَاشاً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ja`alal-layla libasa ya man ja`alan-nahara ma`aa-sha
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has made the night a covering,
O He, Who has made the day for seeking livelihood,
(68) For Removal of Plague

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن جَعَلَ النَّوْمَ سُبَاتاًيَّا مَن جَعَلَ السَّمَاءَبِنَاءاً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ja`alan-naw-ma subata ya man ja`alas-sama-a bina-a
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has made sleep a rest,
O He, Who has made the sky a vault,
(68) For Removal of Plague

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن جَعَلَ الأَشْيَاءَ أَزْوَاجاًيَّا مَن جَعَلَ النَّارَ مِرْصَاداً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ja`alal-ash-ya-a az-waja ya man ja`alan-nara mir-sada
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has created things in pairs,
O He, Who has made hell an ambush, barking for sinners.
(68) For Removal of Plague

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا سَمِيعُ يَا شَفِيعُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya samiu' ya shafiu'
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I entreat You in Your name
O All-hearer, O Mediator,
(69) For Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا رَفِيعُ يَا مَنِيعُيَا سَرِيعُ يَا بَدِيعُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Sublime, O Invincible,
O Swift, O Originator,
ya rafiu' ya maniu’ ya sariu' ya badiu'
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (69) For Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
يَا كَبِيرُ يَا قَدِيرُيَا خَبِيرُ يَا مُجِيرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Great, O Omnipotent,
ya kabiru ya qadir ya khabiru ya mujir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Knowing, O Supporter.
(69) For Promotion in Ranks

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا حَيّاً قَبْلَ كُلِّ حَيّيَّا حَيّاً بَعْدَ كُلِّ حَيّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
OEverliving, preceding every living being,
OEverliving, succeeding every living being,
ya hayyanqablakulli hay ya hayyamba`adakulli hay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (70) For Long Life

slides.arabic:
يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ حَيٌّيَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي لا يُشَارِكُهُ حَيٌّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya hayyulladhilaysakamith-lihihay ya hayyulladhilayusha-rikuhuhay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OEverliving, like unto Whom there is none,
OEverliving, Who has no living partner,

slides.arabic:
يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي لا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى حَيّيَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي يُمِيتُ كُلَّ حَيّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya hayyulladhilayah-tajuilahay ya hayyulladhiyumitukulla hay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: OEverliving, Who is not dependent on any living being, OEverliving, Who causes every living being to die,

slides.arabic:
يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي يَرْزُقُ كُلَّ حَيّيَّا حَيّاً لَّمْ يَرِثِ الْحَيَاةَ مِنْ حَيّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya hayyulladhiyarzuqukulla hay ya hay-yallamyarithil-hayatamin hay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OEverliving, Who provides sustenance to every living being,
OEverliving, Who has not inherited life from any living being,

slides.arabic:
يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي يُحْيِي الْمَوْتَىيَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ، لا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةً وَّلا نَوْمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya hay-yul-ladhi yuh-yi al-maw-taya hayyuyaqay-yumulata-khudhuhusinatuwwalanawm
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OEverliving, Who quickens the dead,
OEverliving, O Self-Subsistent, Slumber seizes Him not, nor sleep.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ ذِكْرٌ لا يُنْسَىيَا مَن لَّهُ نُورٌ لا يُطْفَى
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahu dhik-rul-la yun-sa ya mal-lahu nurul-la yut-fa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose remembrance is not forgotten,
O He, Whose light is not extinguished
(71) For Safeguard from Cyclones

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ نِعْمٌ لا تُعَدُّيَّا مَن لَّهُ مُلْكٌ لا يَزُولُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mallahunia'mullatua'dya mallahumulkullayazul
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose bounties are countless,
O He, Whose grandeur is perpetual,
(71) For Safeguard from Cyclones

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ ثَنَاءٌ لا يُحْصَىيَا مَن لَّهُ جَلاَلٌ لا يُكَيَّفُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mallahuthana-ullayuh-saya mallahujalalullayukay-yafu
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose praise does not admit of alteration, O He, Whose glory is not framed,
(71) For Safeguard from Cyclones

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ كَمَالٌ لا يُدْرَكُيَا مَن لَّهُ قَضَاءٌ لا يُرَدُّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahu kamalul-la yud-rak ya mal-lahu qada-ul-la yurad-d
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose perfection cannot be comprehended,
OHe, Whose order is not rejected,
(71) For Safeguard from Cyclones

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّهُ صِفَاتٌ لا تُبَدَّلُيَا مَن لَّهُ نُعُوتٌ لا تُغَيَّرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lahu sifatul-la tubad-dal ya mal-lahu nuo'otul-la tughay-yar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose attributes do not change,
O He, Whose attributes do not alter,
(71) For Safeguard from Cyclones

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَيَا مَاِلكَ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bal-a'alamin ya malika yaw-mid-din
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of all the worlds,
O Master of the Day ofJudgement,
(72) For Cure of Breast Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا غَايَةَ الطَّاِلبِينَيَا ظَهْرَاللاَّجِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ghayatat-talibin ya zah-ra al-lajin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Ultimate Goal of the seeker,
O Refuge of the seeker of shelter,
(72) For Cure of Breast Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا مُدْرِكَ الْهَارِبِينيَا مَن يُّحِبُّ الصَّابِرِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mud-rikal-haribin ya may-yuhib-bus-sabirin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OOvertakerof the fugitive,
O He Who loves the patient,
(72) For Cure of Breast Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّحِبُّ التَّوَّابِينَيَا مَن يُّحِبُّ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yuhib-but-taw-wabin ya may-yuhib-bul-mutatah-hirin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who loves the repentant,
O He, Who loves the pure,
(72) For Cure of Breast Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّحِبُّ الْمُحْسِنِينَيَا مَنْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِالْمُهْتَدِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who loves the virtuous
O He, Who knows best the guided,
ya may-yuhib-bul-muh-sininyamanhuwaa`a-lamubial-muh-tadin
(72) For Cure of Breast Pain

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا شْفِيقُ يَا رَفِيقُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Affectionate, O Companion,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya sh-fiqu ya rafiq
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(73) For Cure from Rheumatism

slides.arabic:
يَا حَفِيظُ يَا مُحِيطُيَا مُقِيتُ يَا مُغِيثُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Protector, OEncompasser,
ya hafizu ya muhit ya muqitu ya mughith
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Provider of sustenance, O Aider of seekers of aid,
(73) For Cure from Rheumatism

slides.arabic:
يَا مُعِزُّ يَا مُذِلُّيَا مُبْدِئُ يَا مُعِيدُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
OHonourer, O Humiliating,
ya mui`iz-zu ya mudhil ya mubdi-u ya mue'ed
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Creator, O He Who causes to return.
(73) For Cure from Rheumatism

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَحَدٌ بِلاَ ضِدّيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فَرْدٌ بِلاَ نِدّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa ahadum bila did-dya man huwa far-dum bila nid-d
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is single and without opposite,
O He, Who is Unique, O He, Who is Peerless,
(74) For Birth of Son

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَصْمْدٌبِلاَعَيْبيَّا مَنْ هُوَ وِتْرٌ بِلاَ كَيْف
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa s-m-dum bila `ayb ya man huwa wit-rum bila kayf
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is Independent and without any defect,
O He, Who is without changing state,
(74) For Birth of Son

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ قَاض بِلاَ حَيْفيَّا مَنْ هُوَ رَبٌّ بِلاَ وَزِير
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa qadim bila hayf ya man huwa rab-bum bila wazir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who judges without injustice,
O He, Who is the Lord Cherisher,
(74) For Birth of Son

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَزِيزٌ بِلاَ ذُلّيَّا مَنْ هُوَ غَنِيٌّ بِلاَ فَقْر
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa `azizum bila dhul ya man huwa ghani-yum bila faq-r
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is Mighty without disgrace,
O He, Who is Independent without any need,
(74) For Birth of Son

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ مَلِكٌ بِلاَ عَزْليَّا مَنْ هُوَ مَوْصُوفٌ بِلاَ شَبِيه
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa malikum bila `azl ya man huwa maw-sufum bila shabih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is the King without any censure,
O He, Whose attributes are matchless.
(74) For Birth of Son

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن ذِكْرُهُ شَرَفٌ لِّلذَّاكِرِينَيَا مَن شُكْرُهُ فَوْزٌ لِّلشَّاكِرِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man dhik-ruhu sharaful-lidh-dhakirin ya man shuk-ruhu fawzul-lish-shakirin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Whose remembrance is anhonourfor those who remember Him, O He, Whose gratitude is success for the grateful,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ حَمْدُهُ عِزٌّ لِّلْحَامِدِينَيَا مَنْ طَاعَتُهُ نَجَاةً لِّلْمُطِيعِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ham-duhu i`iz-zul-lil-hamidin ya man ta`atuhu najatul-lil-muti'en
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Whose praise is the pride of thepraiser,OHe, the obedience to Whom is salvation for the obedient

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ بَابُهُ مَفْتُوحٌ لِّلطَّاِلبِينَيَا مَنْ سَبِيلُهُ وَاضِحٌ لِّلْمُنِيبِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mam babuhu maf-tuhul-lit-talibin ya man sabiluhu wadihul-lil-munibin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose door is open to the seeker,
O He, the path leading to Whom is clear for the repentant,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ آيَاتُهُ بُرْهَانٌ لِّلنَّاظِرِينَيَا مَنْ كِتَابُهُ تَذْكِرَةً لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man a-yatuhu bur-hanul-lin-nazirin ya man kitabuhu tadhkiratul-lil-mut-taqin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Whose signs are proofs for the observers, O He, Whose Book is advice to the pious,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن رِّزْقُهُ عُمُومٌ لِّلطَّائِعِينَ وَالْعَاصِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mar-rizquhu u'mumul-lit-ta-ie'ena wal-a'asin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Whose provision, is love the obedient and disobedient alike,

slides.arabic:
يَا مْن رَّحْمَتُهُ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mar-rah-matuhu qaribum-minal-muh-sinin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O He, Whose mercy is close to the virtuous.

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن تَبَارَكَ اسْمُهُيَا مَن تَعَالَى جَدُّهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man tabarakas-muh ya man ta`aala jad-duh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose name is glorious,
O He, Whosehonouris exalted,
(76) For Cure from Leprosy

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا إِلَهَ غَيْرُهُيَا مَن جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la ilaha ghayruh ya man jal-la thana-uh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-there is no deity except Him,
O He-great is His praise,
(76) For Cure from Leprosy

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن تَقَدَّسَتْ أَسْمَاؤُهُيَا مَن يَّدُومُ بَقَاؤُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man taqad-dasat as-ma-uh ya may-yadumu baqa-uh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose names are sacred,
O He, Whose existence is eternal,
(76) For Cure from Leprosy

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنِ العَظَمَةُبَهَاؤُهُيَا مَنْ الْكِبْرِيَاءُ رِدَاؤُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya manil-a'zamatu baha-uh ya manil-kib-ri-ya-u rida-uh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose glory is His ornament,
O He, Whose greatness is His covering,
(76) For Cure from Leprosy

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا تُحْصَى آلاؤُهُيَا مَن لا تُعَدُّ نَعْمَاؤُهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la tuh-sa a-la-uh ya mal-la tua'd-du na`a-ma-uh
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whosefavoursare countless,
O He, Whose bounties cannot be enumerated.
(76) For Cure from Leprosy

slides.arabic:
