سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا مُعِينُ يَا أَمِينُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Helper, O Trustworthy,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya mue'enu ya amin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(77) For Disbursement of Debt

slides.arabic:
يَا مُبِينُ يَا مَتِينُيَا مَكِينُ يَا رَشِيدُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Manifest, O Powerful,
O Firm, O True Guide,
ya mubinu ya matin ya makinu ya rashid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (77) For Disbursement of Debt

slides.arabic:
يَا حَمِيدُ يَا مَجِيدُيَا شَدِيدُ يَا شَهِيدُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Praiseworthy, O Glorious,
O Strong, O Witness
ya hamidu ya majidu ya shadidu ya shahid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (77) For Disbursement of Debt

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا ذْا الْعَرْشِ الْمَجِيدِيَا ذْا الْقَوْلِ السَّدِيدِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-a'r-shil-majid ya dhal-qaw-lis-sadid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of the Glorious Throne,
O He, Whose words are right.

slides.arabic:
يَا ذْا الْفِعْلِ الرَّشِيدِيَا ذَا البَطْشِ الشَّدِيدِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-fia'-lir-rashid ya dhal-bat-shish-shadid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of great deeds,
O He, Whose punishment is severe

slides.arabic:
يَا ذْا الوَعْدِ وَالوَعِيدِيَا مَنْ هُوَ الْوَلِيُّ الحَمِيدُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-wa`a-di wal-wae'ed ya man hual-wali-yul-hamid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of promise and threat,
OHe, Who is guardian and the most praised one,

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ هُوَ فْعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيدُيَا مَنْ هُوَ قْرِيبٌ غَيْرُ بَعِيد
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yamanhuwaf-a'alullimayuridyamanhuwaqribunghayrubae'ed
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is the mighty doer of whatever He wills,
OHe, Who is near and not far,

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْء شَهِيدٌيَا مَنْ هُوَ لَيْسَ بِظَلاَّم لِّلْعَبِيدِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa `ala kul-li shay-in shahid ya man huwa laysa bizal-lamil-lil-a'bid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is Witness to everything,
OHe, Who is not the least cruel to his slaves,

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا شَرِيكَ لَهُوَلاوَزَيرَيَا مَن لا شَبِيهَ لَهُ وَلا نَظِيرَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lasharikalahuwalawazayirya mal-lashabihalahuwalanazir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has no partner and no adviser,
O He, Who has no equal and no match,
(79) For Freedom from Prison

slides.arabic:
يَا خَاِلقَ الشَّمْسِ وَالْقَمَرِ الْمُنِيرِيَا مُغْنِي الْبَائِسِ الْفَقِيرِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khaliqash-sham-si wal-qamaril-munir ya mugh-ni-yal-ba-isil-faqir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Creator of the sun and the bright moon,
O Enricher of the poverty stricken,
(79) For Freedom from Prison

slides.arabic:
يَا رْازِقَ الطِّفْلِ الصَّغِيرِيَا رْاحِمَ الشَّيْخِ الْكَبِيرِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya r-aziqat-tif-lis-saghir ya r-ahimash-shaykhil-kabir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Provider of sustenance to small children,
O Merciful to the very aged ones,
(79) For Freedom from Prison

slides.arabic:
يَا جَابِرَ العَظْمِ الكَسِيرِيَا عِصْمَةَ الْخَائِفِ الْمُسْتَجِيرِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya jabiral-a'zmil-kasir ya i`is-matal-kha-ifil-mus-tajir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Joiner of broken bones,
OProtector of the frightened shelter seekers,
(79) For Freedom from Prison

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِعِبَادِهِ خَبَيِرٌ بَصِيرٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْء قَدِيرٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa bi-i`ibadihi khabayirum basir ya man huwa `ala kul-li shay-in qadir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is All-Aware and All-Seeing of his slaves,OHe, Who is Powerful over everything.
(79) For Freedom from Prison

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْجُودِ وَالنِّعَمِيَا ذَا الْفَضْلِ وَالْكَرَمِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-judi wan-nia'm ya dhal-fadli wal-karam
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Master of generosity and theBestowerof the bounties,
OGracious and Magnanimous,

slides.arabic:
يَا خَاِلقَ اللَّوْحِ وَالْقَلَمِيَا بَارِئَ الذَّرِّ و النَّسَمِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khaliqal-law-hi wal-qalam ya bari-adh-dhar-ri wn-nasam
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Creator of the Tablet and the Pen,
O Creator of ants and men,

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَا الْبَأْسِ وَالنِّقَمِيَا مُلْهِمَ الْعَرَبِ وَالْعَجَمِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya dhal-ba-si wan-niqam ya mul-himal-a'rabi wal-a'jam
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Inflictor of punishment and retaliator,
O Inspirer of Arabs and non-Arabs,

slides.arabic:
يَا كَاشِفَ الضُرِّ وَالأَلَمِيَا عَالِمَ السِّرِّ وَالهِمَمِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya kashifadur-ri wal-alam ya `aalimas-sir-ri wal-himam
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Expeller of pain and grief,
O He, Who knows the secrets and the mysteries,

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ الْبَيْتِ وَالْحَرَمِيَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الأَشْيَاءَ مِنَ الْعَدَمِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-bal-bayti wal-haram ya man khalaqal-ash-ya-a minal-a'dam
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: O Lord of theKaabaand the Sacred Precinct, O He, Who has created everything out of nothingness,

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا فَاعِلُ يَا جَاعِلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Doer, O Creator
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya fai`ilu ya ja-i`ilu
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(81) To cure migraine

slides.arabic:
يَا قَابِلُ يَا كَامِلُيَا فَاصِلُ يَا وَاصِلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Acceptor, O Perfect,
O Gracious, O Separator
ya qabilu ya kamil ya fasilu ya wasil
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (81) To cure migraine

slides.arabic:
يَا عَادِلُ يَا غَاِلبُيَا طَاِلبُ يَا وَاهِبُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Just, O Dominant,
O Seeker, O Generous
ya `aadilu ya ghalib ya talibu ya wahib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (81) To cure migraine

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ أَنْعَمَ بِطَوْلِهِيَا مَنْ أَكْرَمَ بِجُودِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man an-a'ma bitaw-lih ya man ak-rama bijudih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who graciously bestows His bounties on us,
OHe, Whohonoursus with His charity,
(82) For Cure from Ulcer

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن جَادَ بِلُطْفِهِيَا مَن تَعَزَّزَ بِقُدْرَتِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man jada bilut-fih ya man ta`az-zaza biqud-ratih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who rewards us out of His beneficing,OHe, Who makes us respectable with His might,
(82) For Cure from Ulcer

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن قَدَّرَ بِحِكْمَتِهِيَا مَنْ حَكَمَ بِتَدْبِيرِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man qad-dara bihik-matih ya man hakama bitad-birih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who predestines with His wisdom,
O He, Who judges with His planning,
(82) For Cure from Ulcer

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن دَبَّرَ بِعِلْمِهِيَا مَن تَجَاوَزَ بِحِلْمِهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man dab-bara bi-i`il-mih ya man tajawaza bihil-mih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who decrees with His knowledge,
O He, Who is forbearing with His forbearance,
(82) For Cure from Ulcer

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن دَنَا فِي عُلُوِّهِيَا مَنْ عَلاَ فِي دُنُوِّهِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man dana fi u'lu-wih ya man `ala fi dunu-wih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is near us in spite of His exaltation, O He, Who is exalted despite His nearness.
(82) For Cure from Ulcer

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّخْلُقُ مَا يَشَاءُيَا مَن يَّفْعَلُ مَا يَشَاءُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yakh-luqu ma yasha-u ya may-yaf-a'lu ma yasha-u
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who creates whatever He wishes,
O He, Who does whatever He wishes,
(83) For Cure of Backache

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يَّهْدِي مَن يَّشَاءُيَا مَن يُّضِلُّ مَن يَّشَاءُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yah-di may-yasha-u ya may-yudil-lu may-yasha-u
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who guides whomever He wishes,
O He, Who leaves astray whomever He wishes,
(83) For Cure of Backache

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّعَذِّبُ مَن يَّشَاءُيَا مَن يَّغْفِرُ لِمَن يَّشَاءُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yua'dh-dhibu may-yasha-u ya may-yagh-firu limay-yasha-u
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who punishes whomever He wishes,
O He, Who forgives whomever He wishes,
(83) For Cure of Backache

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّعِزُّ مَن يَّشَاءُيَا مَن يُّذِلُّ مَن يَّشَاءُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya may-yui`iz-zu may-yasha-u ya may-yudhil-lu may-yasha-u
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who honors whomever He wishes,
O He, Who dishonors whomever He wishes,
(83) For Cure of Backache

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن يُّصَوِّرُ فِي الأَرْحَامِ مَا يَشَاءُيَا مَن يَّخْتَصُّ بِرَحْمَتِهِ مَن يَّشَاءُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yamay-yusaw-wirufilarhamimayashau yamayyakhtas-subirah-matihimayyashau
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who fashions in the womb as He wishes, O He, Who chooses for His mercy whoever He wishes.
(83) For Cure of Backache

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لَّمْ يَتَّخِذْ صَاحِبَةًوَّلاوَلَداًيَّا مَن جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ شَيْء قَدْراً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lam yat-takhidh sahibataw-wa-la walada ya man ja`ala likul-li shay-in qad-ra
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has neither wife nor child,
O He, Who creates everything in a fixed measure,
(84) For cure of pain in right side of body

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لا يُشْرِكُ فِي حُكْمِهِ أَحَداًيَّا مَن جَعَلَ الْمَلائِكَةَ رُسُلاً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layush-rikufihuk-mihiahadayamanja`alalmalaikatarusulan
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who has no partner in His rule,
O He, Who appointed angels as messengers,
(84) For cure of pain in right side of body

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن جَعَلَ فِي السَّمَاءِ بُرُوجاًيَّا مَن جَعَلَ الأَرْضَ قَرَاراً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ja`ala fis-sama-i burujan ya man ja`alal-ar-da qarara
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who made constellations in the heaven, O He, Who made the earth a place of abode,
(84) For cure of pain in right side of body

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ خَلَقَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ بَشَراًيَّا مَن جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ شَيْء أَمَداً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man khalaqa minal-ma-i bashara ya man ja`ala likul-li shay-in amada
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who created man from water,
O He, Who fixed a period for everything,
(84) For cure of pain in right side of body

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْء عِلْماًيَّا مَنْ أَحْصَى كُلَّ شَيْء عَدَداً
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man ahata bikul-li shay-in i`il-maya man ah-sa kul-la shay-in `adada
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything, O He, Who knows the number and quantity of everything.
(84) For cure of pain in right side of body

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا أَوَّلُ يَا آخِرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O First, O Last,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya aw-walu ya a-khir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(85) For cure from pain of waist

slides.arabic:
يَا ظَاهِرُ يَا بَاطِنُيَا بَرُّ يَا حَقُّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Manifest, O Hidden,
O Virtuous, O Right,
ya zahiru ya batin ya bar-ru ya haq-qu
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (85) For cure from pain of waist

slides.arabic:
يَا فَرْدُ يَا وِتْرُيَا صَمَدُ يَا سَرْمَدُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Independent, O Eternal
ya far-du ya wit-r ya samadu ya sar-mad
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, O Unique,
(85) For cure from pain of waist

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ مَعْرُوف عُرِفَيَا أَفْضَلَ مَعْبُود عُبِدَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayra ma`a-rufin u'rifa ya af-dala ma`a-budin u'bid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best recognized of all the recognized,
O Best of all to be worshipped,
(86) To cure Spleen ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا أَجَلَّ مَشْكُور شُكِرَيَا أَعَزَّ مَذْكُور ذُكِرَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ajal-la mash-kurin shukir ya a`az-za madhkurin dhukir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Greatest of those to whom thanks are due, O Most remembered of all who are remembered,
(86) To cure Spleen ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا أَعْلَى مَحْمُود حُمِدَيَا أَقْدَمَ مَوْجُود طُلِبَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya a`a-la mah-mudin humid ya aq-dama maw-judin tulib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most praiseworthy of all those who are praised, O Eternal Existent who is sought,
(86) To cure Spleen ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا أَرْفَعَ مَوْصُوف وُصِفَيَا أَكْبَرَ مَقْصُود قُصِدَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ar-fa`a maw-sufiw-wusif ya ak-bara maq-sudin qusid
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Highest of those who are praised,
O Greatest of the purposes which are striven for,
(86) To cure Spleen ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا أَكْرَمَ مَسْؤُول سُئِلَيَا أَشْرَفَ مَحْبُوب عُلِمَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ak-rama mas-ulin su-il ya ash-rafa mah-bubin u'lim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most liberal giver who is requested,
O Noblest Friend who is known.
(86) To cure Spleen ailments

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا حَبِيبَ الْبَاكِينَيَا سَيِّدَ المُتَوَكِّلِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya habibal-bakin ya say-yidal-mutawak-kilin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Friend of those who weep,
O Refuge of those who trust in Him,
(87) For cure of Headache

slides.arabic:
يَا هَادِي الْمُضِلِّينَيَا وَلِيَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya hadi-yal-mudil-lin ya wali-yal-mu-minin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Guide of the misguided,
O Master of the faithful,
(87) For cure of Headache

slides.arabic:
يَا أَنِيسَ الذَّاكِرِينَيَا مَفْزَعَ الْمَلْهُوفِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya anisadh-dhakirin ya mafza`al-mal-hufin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Friend of worshippers,
O Shelter of the sorrowful,
(87) For cure of Headache

slides.arabic:
يَا مُنجِي الصَّادِقِينَيَا أَقْدَرَ القَادِرِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya munji-yas-sadiqin ya aq-daral-qadirin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Redeemer of the truthful,
O Mightiest of all,
(87) For cure of Headache

slides.arabic:
يَا أَعْلَمَ العَالِمِينَيَا إِلَهَ الْخَلْقِ أَجْمَعِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya a`a-lamal-a'alimin ya ilaha al-khal-qi aj-mae'en
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O the most Knowledgeable of all beings.
OAllāhof the entire Creation,
(87) For cure of Headache

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ عَلاَ فَقَهَرَيَا مَن مَّلَكَ فَقَدَرَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man `ala faqahar ya mam-malaka faqadar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is high and dominant,
O He, Who is masterful and powerful,
(88) To cure pain in forehead

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ بَطَنَ فَخَبَرَيَا مَنْ عُبِدَ فَشَكَرَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mam batana fakhabara ya man u'bida fashakara
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is hidden and aware,
O He, Who is worshipped and who appreciates,
(88) To cure pain in forehead

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ عُصِي فَغَفَرَيَا مَن لا تَحْوِيهِ الْفِكَرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man u'siya faghafar ya mal-la tah-wihi al-fikar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is disobeyed and yet forgives,
O He, Whom thought cannot encompass,
(88) To cure pain in forehead

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يُدْرِكُهُ بَصَرٌيَّا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ أثَرٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la yud-rikuhu basar ya mal-la yakh-fa `ailayhi athar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Whom eyes cannot see,
O He, from Whom nothing is concealed,
(88) To cure pain in forehead

slides.arabic:
يَا رَازِقَ الْبَشَرِيَا مُقَدِّرَ كُلِّ قَدَر
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya raziqa al-bashar ya muqad-dira kul-li qadar
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Provider of Sustenance to mankind,
O He, Who ordained all destinies.
(88) To cure pain in forehead

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا حَافِظُ يَا بَارِئُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Protector, O Maker,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya hafizu ya bari
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(89) To cure Urinary incontinence

slides.arabic:
يَا ذَارِئُ يَا بَاذِخُيَا فَارِجُ يَا فَاتِحُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Revealer, O Victorious,
ya dhari-u ya badhikh ya fariju ya fatih
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Creator, O All-generous,
(89) To cure Urinary incontinence

slides.arabic:
يَا كَاشِفُ يَا ضَامِنُيَا آمِرُ يَا نَاهِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Disclosers, O Guarantor,
ya kashifu ya damin ya a-miru ya nahi
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Commander, OProhibiter.
(89) To cure Urinary incontinence

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يَعْلَمُ الْغَيْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَيَا مَن لا يَصْرِفُ السُّوءَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, besides Whom no one knows the secrets, O He, besides Whom no one drives away calamities,
ya mal-laya`a-lamul-ghaybaillahuwaya mal-layasrifussuoa illahuwa
(90) For cure of Umbilical Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يَخْلُقُ الْخَلْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَيَا مَن لا يَغْفِرُ الذَّنْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layakh-luqul-khal-qaillahuwaya mal-layagh-firudh-dham-baillahuwa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, besides Whom no one creates,
O He, besides Whom no one forgives sins,
(90) For cure of Umbilical Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يُتِمُّ النِّعْمَةَ إِلاَّ هُوَيَا مَن لا يُقَلِّبُ الْقُلُوبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layutimmunnia'-mata illahuwaya mal-layuqal-libul-qulubaillahuwa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, besides Whom no one perfects the bounties, O He, besides Whom no one transforms hearts,
(90) For cure of Umbilical Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يُدَبِّرُ الأَمْرَ إِلاَّ هُويَا مَن لا يُنَزِّلُ الْغَيْثَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layudabbirulamraillahuya mal-layunaz-zilul-ghaythaillahuwa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, besides Whom no one manages affairs, O He, besides Whom no one holds the reins,
(90) For cure of Umbilical Pain

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَيَا مَن لا يُحْيِي الْمَوْتَى إِلاَّ هُوَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layab-sutur-rizqaillahuwaya mal-layuh-yil-maw-taillahuwa
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, besides Whom no one increases sustenance, O He, besides Whom no one revives the dead.
(90) For cure of Umbilical Pain

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مُعِينَ الضُّعَفَاءِيَا صَاحِبَ الْغُرَبَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mue'enad-dua'fa-i ya sahibal-ghuraba-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Helper of the weak,
O Companion of the strangers,
(91) For cure of Stone in Bladder

slides.arabic:
يَا نَاصِرَ الأَوْلِيَاءِيَا قَاهِرَ الأَعْدَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya nasiral-aw-li-ya-i ya qahiral-a`a-da-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Helper of [His] friends,
OOverpowererof the enemies,
(91) For cure of Stone in Bladder

slides.arabic:
يَا رَافِعَ السَّمَاءِيَا أَنِيسَ الأَصْفِيَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rafia's-sama-i ya anisal-as-fi-ya-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Elevator of the sky,
O Genial to the chosen ones,
(91) For cure of Stone in Bladder

slides.arabic:
يَا حَبِيبَ الأَتْقِيَاءِيَا كَنزَ الْفُقَرَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya habibal-at-qi-ya-i ya kanzal-fuqara-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Friend of the pious,
O Treasure of the indigent,
(91) For cure of Stone in Bladder

slides.arabic:
يَا إِلَهَ الأَغْنِيَاءِيَا أَكْرَمَ الْكُرَمَاءِ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya ilhal-agh-ni-ya-i ya ak-ramal-kurama-i
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord of the rich,
O Most benign of all.
(91) For cure of Stone in Bladder

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا كَافِياً مِّن كُلِّ شَيْءيَّا قَائِماً عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْء
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya kafiyam-min kul-li shayyaqa-iman`alakullishay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who is self-sufficient from everything,
O He Who is established over everything,
(92) For Cure of Piles

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لا يُشْبِهُهُ شَيْءٌيَّا مَن لا يَزِيدُ فِي مُلْكِهِ شَيْءٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la yush-bihuhu shayya mal-la yazidu fi mul-kihi shay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, nothing is like unto Him,
O He, nothing extends His Kingdom,
(92) For Cure of Piles

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌيَّا مَن لا يَنقُصُ مِنْ خَزَائِنِهِ شَيْءٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layakhfa `ailayhishayya mal-layanqusuminkhaza-inihishay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He from Whom nothing is hidden,
O He, nothing decreases His treasure,
(92) For Cure of Piles

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لَّيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْءٌيَّا مَن لا يَعْزُبُ عَنْ عِلْمِهِ شَيْءٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
OHe, Whose Knowledge encompasses everything,
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, nothing is like unto Him,
ya mal-laysa kamith-lihi shayya mal-laya`a-zubu`ani`il-mihishay
(92) For Cure of Piles

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ خَبِيرٌ بِكُلِّ شَيْءيَّا مَن وَّسِعَتْ رَحْمَتُهُ كُلَّ شَيْء
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa kha-birum bikul-li shay ya maw-wasia't rah-matuhu kul-la shay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is All-Aware,
O He, Whose mercy extends to everything.
(92) For Cure of Piles

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا مُكْرِمُ يَا مُطْعِمُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Generous, O Provider,
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya muk-rimu ya mut-i`im
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I beseech You in Your name
(93) For Cure from Ulcer

slides.arabic:
يَا مُنْعِمُ يَا مُعْطِييَا مُغْنِي يَا مُقْنِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration: Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OBestowerof bounties, OBestowerof gifts, O Enricher, O Giver of Shelter
yamun-i`imuyamua'-ti yamughni yamuqni
(93) For Cure from Ulcer

slides.arabic:
يَا مُفْنِي يَا مُحْيِييَا مُرْضِي يَا مُنجِي
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Destroyer, OQuickener,
O Satisfier, O Who grants salvation,
ya muf-ni ya muh-yi ya mur-di ya munji
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english: (93) For Cure from Ulcer

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا أَوَّلَ كُلِّ شَيْء وَّآخِرَهُيَا إِلَهَ كُلِّ شَيْءوَّمَلِيكَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya aw-wala kul-li shayiw-wa a-khirah ya ilaha kul-li shayiw-wa malikah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O First and the Last,
O Lord of everything and its Master,
(94) For cure of Nose Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْء وَّصَانِعَهُيَا بَارِئَ كُلِّ شَيْء وَّخَاِلقَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya rab-ba kul-li shayiw-wa sania'h ya ba-ria kul-li shayiw-wa khaliqah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Lord Cherisher of everything and its Fashioner
OCreator of everything and its Maker,
(94) For cure of Nose Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا قَابِضَ كُلِّ شَيْء وَّبَاسِطَهُيَا مُبْدِئَ كُلِّ شَيْء وَّمُعِيدَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya qabida kul-li shayiw-wa basitah ya mubdia kul-li shayiw-wa mua'ydah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Controller of everything and its Extender,
O Origin of everything and its Return,
(94) For cure of Nose Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا مُنشِئَ كُلِّ شَيْء وَّمُقَدِّرَهُيَا مُكَوِّنَ كُلِّ شَيْء وَّمُحَوِّلَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya munshiwa kul-li shayiw-wa muqad-dirah ya mukaw-wina kul-li shayiw-wa muhaw-wilah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Originator of everything and its estimator,
O Creator of everything and its destroyer,
(94) For cure of Nose Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا مُحْيِي كُلِّ شَيْء وَّمُمِيتَهُيَا خَاِلقَ كُلِّ شَيْء وَّوَارِثَهُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya muh-yi kul-li shayiw-wa mumitah ya khaliqa kul-li shayiw-wa warithah
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OQuickenerof everything and Maker of its death,OAuthor of everything and its inheritor.
(94) For cure of Nose Ailments

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا خَيْرَ ذَاكِر وَّمَذْكُوريَّا خَيْرَ شَاكِر وَّمَشْكُور
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O BestRemembererand Remembered,
ya khayra dhakiriw-wa madhkur ya khayra shakiriw-wa mash-kur
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best Appreciator and Appreciated,
(95) For cure of Stomach Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا خَيْرَ حَامِد وَّمَحْمُوديَّا خَيْرَ شَاهِد وَّمَشْهُود
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O BestPraiserand Praised,
ya khayra hamidiw-wa mah-mud ya khayra shahidiw-wa mash-hud
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best Witness and Witnessed,
(95) For cure of Stomach Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا خَيْرَ دَاع وَّمَدْعُوّيَّا خَيْرَ مُجِيب وَّمُجَاب
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayra dai`iw-wa mad-o'o-win ya khayra mujibiw-wa mujab
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best Inviter and Invited,
O Best Responder and Responded,
(95) For cure of Stomach Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا خَيْرَ مُؤْنِس وَّأَنِيسيَّا خَيْرَ صَاحِب وَّجَلِيس
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayra mu-nisiw-wa anis ya khayra sahibiw-wa jalis
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Best Comforter and Counselor,
O Best Friend and Companion,
(95) For cure of Stomach Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا خَيْرَ مَقْصُود وَّمَطْلُوبيَّا خَيْرَ حَبِيب وَّمَحْبُوب
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya khayra maq-sudiw-wa mat-lub ya khayra habibiw-wa mah-bub
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Most Desired and Sought,
O Most Affectionate and Loved.
(95) For cure of Stomach Ailments

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَن دَعَاهُ مُجِيبٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ أَطَاعَهُ حَبِيبٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa liman da`aahu mujibyamanhuwalimanata`ahuhabib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,the Answerer to him who calls Him,
O Friend of him who obeys Him,
(96) For cure from Knee Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ إِلَى مَنْ أَحَبَّهُ قَرِيبٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْاسْتَحْفَظَهُرَقِيبٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa ila man ahab-bahu qarib ya man huwa biman-s-tah-fazahu raqib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He, Who is close to him who loves Him,
O Protector of one who seeks protection,
(96) For cure from Knee Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَن رَّجَاهُ كَرِيمٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa bimar-rajahu karim ya man huwa biman `asahu halim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāhWho is Generous to him who is hopeful of Him, OAllāh,Who is Forbearing to one who disobeys Him,
(96) For cure from Knee Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ رَحِيمٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ عَظِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi `azamatihi rahim ya man huwa fi hik-matihi `azim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,Who is Merciful in spite of His Grandeur, OAllāh,Who is Great in His Wisdom,
(96) For cure from Knee Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي إِحْسَانِهِ قَدِيمٌيَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ أَرَادَهُ عَلِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa fi ih-sanihi qadim ya man huwa biman aradahu `alim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,Who is Eternal in his Benevolence,
OAllāh,Who is Aware of one who seeks Him.
(96) For cure from Knee Ailments

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَيَا مُسَبِّبُ يَا مُرَغِّبُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma in-ni as-aluka bis-mika ya musab-bibu ya muragh-hib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OAllāh,verily I entreat You in Your name
O Primal Cause, O Creator of desire,
(97) For cure of Throat Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا مُقَلِّبُ يَا مُعَقِّبُ يَا مُرَتِّبُيَا مُخَوِّفُ يَا مُحَذِّرُ يَا مُذَكِّرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Changer, O Inflictor, O Organizer,
OReminder,
yamuqal-libuyamua'q-qibuyamurat-tibyamukhaw-wifuyamuhadh-dhiruyamudhak-kir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He who puts Fear, O Saver,
(97) For cure of Throat Ailments

slides.arabic:
يَا مُسَخِّرُ يَا مُغَيِّرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya musakh-hiru ya mughay-yir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
OSubjector, O Displacer.
(97) For cure of Throat Ailments

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ عِلْمُهُ سَابِقٌيَّا مَن وَّعْدُهُ صَادِقٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man i`il-muhu sabiq ya maw-wa`a-duhu sadiq
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose Knowledge is eternal,
O He Whose Promise is true,
(98) For Acceptance of Legitimate Desire

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لُّطْفُهُ ظَاهِرٌيَّا مَنْ أَمْرُهُ غَاِلبٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-lut-fuhu zahir ya man am-ruhu ghalib
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose Benignity is manifest,
O He Whose Command is overruling,
(98) For Acceptance of Legitimate Desire

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن كِتَابُهُ مُحْكَمٌيَّا مَن قَضَاؤُه كَائِنٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man kitabuhu muh-kam ya man qada-uh ka-in
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose Book is clear and final,
O He WhoseJudgementis inevitable,
(98) For Acceptance of Legitimate Desire

slides.reference: O He Whose Qur'an is glorious,
slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن قُرْآنُهُ مَجِيدٌيَّا مَن مُّلْكُهُ قَدِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man qur-a-nuhu majid ya mam-mul-kuhu qadim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Whose Rule is eternal,
(98) For Acceptance of Legitimate Desire

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن فَضْلُهُ عَمِيمٌيَّا مَن عَرْشُهُ عَظِيمٌ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man fadluhu `amim ya man `ar-shuhu `azim
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He WhoseFavouris common to all,
O He Whose Throne is great.
(98) For Acceptance of Legitimate Desire

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يَشْغَلُهُ سَمْعٌ عَن سَمْع
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la yash-ghaluhu sam-u'n `an sam-i`in
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-listening to one individual does not prevent Him from listening to others simultaneously,
(99) For cure of Pain in Foot

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لا يَمْنَعُهُ فِعْلٌ عَن فِعْل
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layam-nau'hufi-a'-lun `anfia'-l
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-doing one thing does not prevent Him from doing other things simultaneously,
(99) For cure of Pain in Foot

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لا يُلْهِيهِ قَوْلٌ عَن قَوْل
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layul-hihiqawlun `anqaw-lin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-the speech of one person does not make Him needless of the simultaneous speech of others,
(99) For cure of Pain in Foot

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لا يُغَلِّطُهُ سُؤَالٌ عَن سُؤَال
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layughal-lituhusualun`ansual
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-one request does not make Him forgetful of other requests,
(99) For cure of Pain in Foot

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لا يَحْجُبُهُ شَيْءٌ عَن شَيْء
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layah-jubuhushayun`anshay
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-the sight of one thing does not prevent him from seeing other things simultaneously,
(99) For cure of Pain in Foot

slides.arabic:
يَّا مَن لا يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ الْمُلِحِّينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-layub-rimuhuil-hahul-mulih-hin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He-the plaintive cries of those who weep and lament do not bother Him,
(99) For cure of Pain in Foot

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَايَةُ مُرَادِ الْمُرِيدِينَيَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنتَهَى هِمَمِ الْعَارِفِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
yamanhuwaghayatumuradil-muridinyamanhuwamuntahahimamil-a'arifin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who is the ultimate Aim of the efforts of saints,
OHe Who is the Goal of Gnostics,
(99) For cure of Pain in Foot

slides.arabic:
يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنتَهَى طَلَبِالطَّاِلبِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya man huwa muntahatalabit-talibin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He Who is the Goal of seekers,
(99) For cure of Pain in Foot

slides.arabic:
يَا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ ذَرَّةً فِي الْعَالَمِينَ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya mal-la yakh-fa `ailayhi dhar-ratun fil-a'alamin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O He from Whom not a single particle in the worlds is hidden.
(99) For cure of Pain in Foot

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
يَا حَلِيماً لا يَعْجَلُيَا جَوَاداً لا يَبْخَلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya halimal-la ya`a-jal ya jawadal-la yab-khal
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Forbearing Who does not make haste,
O Generous Who is never a miser,
(100) For cure of Pain in leg

slides.arabic:
يَا صَادِقاً لا يُخْلِفُيَا وَهَّاباً لا يَمَلُّ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
O Munificent Who never regrets,
ya sadiqal-la yukh-lif ya wah-habal-la yamal-l
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O True Who never breaks the promise
(100) For cure of Pain in leg

slides.arabic:
يَا قَاهِراً لا يُغْلَبُيَا عَظِيماً لا يُوصَفُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya qahiral-la yugh-lab ya `azimal-la yusaf
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Dominant Who is never overpowered,
O Great Who is indescribable
(100) For cure of Pain in leg

slides.arabic:
يَا عَدْلاً لا يَحِيفُيَا غَنِيّاً لا يَفْتَقِرُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya `ad-lal-la yahifu ya ghani-yal-la yaf-taqir
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Just Who is never oppressive,
O Bounteous Who is never rapacious,
(100) For cure of Pain in leg

slides.arabic:
يَا كَبِيراً لا يَصْغُرُيَا حَافِظاً لا يَغْفَلُ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
ya kabiral-la yas-ghur ya hafizal-la yagh-fal
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O Great Who does not become small,
O Protector Who does not neglect.
(100) For cure of Pain in leg

slides.arabic:
سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَالغَوْثَالغَوْثَخَلِّصْنا مِنَ النّارِ يا رَبِّ.
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
subhanakaya lailahailla anta alghawthalghawthkhallisnaminannariyarabb
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief,
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

slides.arabic:
اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّعَلَىٰمُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
slides.english:
O'Allāhsend Your blessings on Muhammad
and the family of Muhammad.

slides.reference: Kindly recite Sura E Fatiha for Marhumeen of all those who have worked towards making this small work possible.
slides.arabic: دعاء الجوشن الكبير
slides.transliteration:
Dua’a al-Jawshan al-Kabir
Sūrat al-Fātiḥah
slides.english: for
slides.note:
ALL MARHUMEEN
